name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Defend President Trump’s Majority
body:
Tomorrow at midnight marks our LAST mid-month deadline before our final quarterly fundraising report.
Peter,Tomorrow at midnight marks our LAST mid-month deadline before our final quarterly fundraising report. **And we 're still $18,783 SHORT of our goal.**I need your help to keep the Senate RED and DEFEND President Trump's Majority right now.**DEFEND TRUMP 'S SENATE MAJORITY** [CHIP-IN $25 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xlidjtd-fuutjhhtj-r/) [CHIP-IN $50 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xlidjtd-fuutjhhtj-y/) [CHIP-IN $100 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xlidjtd-fuutjhhtj-j/) [CHIP-IN $250 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xlidjtd-fuutjhhtj-t/) Democrats are shattering fundraising records to flip the Senate and defeat President Trump. Here in Tennessee, my radical left-wing opponent has raised over $300,000 in the last month alone to FLIP our state blue. We can't keep falling behind and we're running out of time. Tomorrow night's mid-month deadline is one our LAST opportunities to catch up.[**Can you chip-in right now?**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xlidjtd-fuutjhhtj-i/) Thank you for your support.Bill Hagerty

subject: Hey there, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:

So I'll cut right to the chase: **We need to hit our mid-month goal by 11:59 PM TOMORROW NIGHT to continue funding critical programs within our campaign.**

_David Perdue has $35 MILLION supporting him from Mitch McConnell and his allies._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20for=20Biden?=
subject: 50 Days
body:
Moms are fighting for "the soul of our nation". Help us get to November 3rd! | | | |
---
|
---
| [Chip in ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=1c00cd6686&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in ")
---
| | |
### Friend,

How do you think we’ll close the wage gap, end gun violence, and finally bring this country into the 21st century when it comes to paid leave?

**By electing more women and mothers who get it.**
**By electing a leader who cares about our country, our children and will prioritize helping working families get back on their feet.** Women, and especially moms, are disproportionately bearing the economic and emotional burden of life - which is why it's so important to elect candidates who advocate for policies like universal childcare, paid leave, and a livable wage. **We are just 50 days out from November 3rd** \- can you chip in today to help us support leaders and women who will bring the voices of American families to the table? Sign up for a monthly reoccurring donation of $50 and we will send you as a mask as a gift! Thank you!

Chip in[ $5 ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=738454b22c&e=3f151f8b74)and make these 50 days count!

Moms in Office

By electing more women and mothers who get it. By electing a leader who cares about our country, our children and will prioritize helping working families get back on their feet. Women, and especially moms, are disproportionately bearing the economic and emotional burden of life - which is why it's so important to elect candidates who advocate for policies like universal childcare, paid leave, and a livable wage. We are just 50 days out from November 3rd \- can you chip in today to help us support leaders and women who will bring the voices of American families to the table? Sign up for a monthly reoccurring donation of $50 and we will send you as a mask as a gift! Thank you! Chip in make these 50 days count! Moms in Office | "CHIP IN" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | www.momsinoffice.org | | Copyright © 2020 Moms in Office, All rights reserved.

name: Taylor Campaign
subject: A message from Scott...
body:
---
| | | | | | Tuesday, September 15th 2020
---
|
---
| A message from Scott...
---
| This morning, a peace deal will be signed at the White House between Israel, the United Arab Emirates, and Bahrain.
This new peace deal, and the move of our American embassy to Jerusalem, are truly historic achievements by the Trump administration.
Below is a speech that I gave in the Holy Land in 2016.
I also had the honor of attending the U.S. Embassy opening in Jerusalem in 2018. I am hopeful for more movement along the path of peace by the people of the Middle East ...what happens in that region affects the world.
I am thankful for the [International Leaders Summit](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M4tQUtkCiGd3tfX1g00m5PRLQ_GmT5Mh8RNTvSsppd2kuP5GZ8kLIsWhkg_P5xKIV1o2MVIzUmjlHHGY5A2-NlIG3xijBGbLELOrZeNF0nttvbzK7RYuqkA2dDSBKrDiLX2vAAsy6LNQl1H2CA1daP-shtVXgTezCBKY9hG56_eflsXgoxz_ONasiDk6T-lRQQDG10EmaaQs2hIxYToJtPdmiEQffAawc-mc_m69hZHxOBzfN2F6O8wEjlyO3aILi8HZM2SEG_cOAiFfJ-EDArDj-cu_KLycKle2__zO7AED0FDwvW4aepBiKVPPwAfxp3mxN62qR1p_qlyLJnH1LelGIzMS3LRxgkua7vw4LCFJvlgY-IVSb4LxbjGwH2NHj9CyHW2XvgDClbI1TCciB-09PYB9lTMr5MUMmBHcVcXrsdovPc1n4ATMZI68EXNnt_rrApXtdqvVp1UwmmsC_g==&c=wz1rnnlwr1Kc2CDItEkFLmAKWeLX69UW9MJJ0c3ONrxYIArvfMKHYA==&ch=jld_wgOXVOcVBPKCY-E6zwnaD0oINZeExRiZT3xTPmB0GKWFEd_9vA==) for their hard work and for having me in Jerusalem. Today, I am thankful for America's part in promoting peace in the region, highlighted with another historic peace deal passed by this Administration.
---
|
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M4tQUtkCiGd3tfX1g00m5PRLQ_GmT5Mh8RNTvSsppd2kuP5GZ8kLIsWhkg_P5xKIwHTLakiPy57cuYY6Tnn21D9AT7JRxjQS0YP80SFmegDhIqVWJVBD7StPkQAprodqrDqXdYgd1qyWFdrZLKQqGeAaWpw8m9jj7AcUO3NFLbV8t1gHMBHTGcRMi93pUc2VwRoEUfaEDH31SFNQysqIbAf7Pk0ObjVKMEfJ9dYsYrkgBJbJszV1o9BTcrKqEY71ZgLnXmoUEQS7FGQVwHTLOXj7Wschihmc9UtKkLEeJ30=&c=wz1rnnlwr1Kc2CDItEkFLmAKWeLX69UW9MJJ0c3ONrxYIArvfMKHYA==&ch=jld_wgOXVOcVBPKCY-E6zwnaD0oINZeExRiZT3xTPmB0GKWFEd_9vA==)

| What's the best way to get involved this week? GO VOTE.
Cast your vote- early and in-person! Show your ID at your local voter registrar office and vote the entire November ballot on Friday, September 18th. Ensure that your vote is counted & that you miss the hectic lines of Election Day.
Find your local information, like hours and location, visit:

clean_body: | | | | | | Tuesday, September 15th 2020 | | A message from Scott... | This morning, a peace deal will be signed at the White House between Israel, the United Arab Emirates, and Bahrain. This new peace deal, and the move of our American embassy to Jerusalem, are truly historic achievements by the Trump administration. Below is a speech that I gave in the Holy Land in 2016. I also had the honor of attending the U.S. Embassy opening in Jerusalem in 2018. I am hopeful for more movement along the path of peace by the people of the Middle East ...what happens in that region affects the world. I am thankful for the == for their hard work and for having me in Jerusalem. Today, I am thankful for America's part in promoting peace in the region, highlighted with another historic peace deal passed by this Administration. | | == | | | | What's the best way to get involved this week? GO VOTE. Cast your vote- early and in-person! Show your ID at your local voter registrar office and vote the entire November ballot on Friday, September 18th. Ensure that your vote is counted & that you miss the hectic lines of Election Day. Find your local information, like hours and location, visit: | | | == | | == | | | == | | == | Questions? Simply reply to this email or call us directly at (757) 366-1072. | | | | | | ---|--- | Thin Brew Line Join us at Thin Brew Line in Virginia Beach to meet Scott, get involved, and support a local business. Join us at the Grand Opening of the GOP Office on the Peninsula! Come out and meet Scott and learn about ways to get involved in critical campaigns this cycle. Voting begins THIS Friday and we are less than 50 days from election day - the time is NOW! In the race to keep up with the Democrats and their mega-donors from the East and West Coasts, our campaign is approaching an important deadline on September 15 at 11:59 PM.

| Matt is in Congress to fight for you, the American People. He has sworn off corporate PAC money (the only incumbent Republican to do so) and has stood by President Trump because he truly believes in the America-First Movement.
We're proud of the country we live in, but Joe Biden and the Democrats want you to be ashamed of her. We cannot improve as a nation if we are shaming our Founding Fathers, tearing down monuments, rioting in the streets, and demonizing our police officers. body:
It's crunch time. No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-xliuie-ahkdjtlkr-u/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xliuie-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,We're 50 days away from the most important election of our lifetimes.The left is ready. They've been working toward this day - with protests, riots, and their anti-Trump derangement - since the day they lost in 2016.But we can still WIN, _**again** , _50 days from today, if we're willing to fight for it! [Join Fitzgerald for Congress - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xliuie-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Join Fitzgerald for Congress - $25](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xliuie-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Join Fitzgerald for Congress - $50](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xliuie-ahkdjtlkr-t/) Between the historic attacks on our flag, on our individual rights, China's direct attack on American dominance, the rise of socialism in Congress, and Trump's re-election, **this is one you can't watch from the sidelines!** Please, take a minute to join me in **fighting back** against the radical left - against Pelosi in Congress, and against the radical liberals who want to take America backward.Thanks,
Scott Fitzgerald

Friend-- **[Tonight, I hope you will join me, Legislative Black Caucus Chairman Lamont Bagby, DPVA Chairwoman Susan Swecker and DPVA Executive Director Andrew Whitley to discuss the work we have done to build Virginia's blue wave and to keep our Commonwealth blue this year and next.](https://act.myngp.com/el/rrS2TT4aXgyRmrSlqeXnP3IjWOcKGP4Hy9w_U7BfWVo=/cozYaqq19L3XRJodIg_BOh7H1iEQ7yhzwQQkDCJrYR0=)** In less than 50 days, we must send Mark Warner back to the US Senate, re-elect Elaine Luria, Abigail Spanberger and Jennifer Wexton and flip the 1st and the 5th Congressional districts with Qasim Rashid and Dr. Cameron Webb. But most importantly, we must send Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House and make Donald Trump a one-term President. Virginia must do its part in November, and we are working to get the job done. But, we need your help. **[Join us tonight to find out about the work we are doing right now to win in November and get ready for a big election year in 2021.](https://act.myngp.com/el/rrS2TT4aXgyRmrSlqeXnP3IjWOcKGP4Hy9w_U7BfWVo=/cozYaqq19L3XRJodIg_BOh7H1iEQ7yhzwQQkDCJrYR0=)** Thanks for all your support and look forward to seeing you tonight. Ralph

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Will you help me keep the Senate RED?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Corky Messner needs our help in New Hampshire to beat establishment Dem Jeanne Shaheen! Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a9b81f740d71c7b1/326cc1107aaabf75c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, I probably don’t need to tell you how important it is that we elect principled conservatives in 2020 and beyond. During these difficult times, we need to keep the Senate RED as we work together to Keep America Great. There’s a critical race happening in New Hampshire this November, and Corky Messner needs our help. The liberals know that if they lose their seat in the Granite State, there is NO chance that they’ll be able to win a majority. Establishment Democrat Jeanne Shaheen is running for reelection, but we can't let her defeat Corky. **Corky just won the Republican Primary in New Hampshire, and I proudly stand with President Trump to endorse and support him**. We have less than two months until the general election, so we need to ramp up our efforts FAST. The Dems are pouring every resource they have into propping up their candidate, and we have to fight back before it’s too late! Will you help by chipping in what you can now to help Corky and keep the Senate RED? **[<< Help with a $5 donation >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a9b81f740d71c7b1/fa5c9a73edd03300c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[<< Help with a $10 donation >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a9b81f740d71c7b1/861f1988f423c740c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[<< Help with a $25 donation >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a9b81f740d71c7b1/c21b1399f19a9ba8c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[<< Help with a $50 donation >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a9b81f740d71c7b1/3144807bb9ad6a64c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[<< Help with a $100 donation >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a9b81f740d71c7b1/8a7a2b1a7ab0b9d2c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[<< Help with a donation of any amount >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a9b81f740d71c7b1/4a4b28f02740c605c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** Corky is a proven leader in the business world, having learned invaluable leadership skills while attending West Point, and later as an Army Ranger. Like President Trump, he’s not a career politician, but he passionately believes in liberty, freedom, and protecting the American Dream for our children and grandchildren. He needs our help to defeat Jeanne Shaheen, and bring a conservative voice to New Hampshire. **If everyone pitches in just a few dollars, we can keep the momentum from his primary win going STRONG through the fall, and win big this November!** [DONATE NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a9b81f740d71c7b1/564f488ee0e147ccc3d6b838967d376c/33153) We can overcome this difficult time in America, but only if we elect principled conservatives to office. We can’t afford any more of the socialist policies from the radical left. I’m looking forward to serving in the Senate with Corky. Please do what you can today to ensure a solid victory for Corky and all Republicans! Thanks for your help,
Ted Cruz [DONATE NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a9b81f740d71c7b1/2da204a15f66f05bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a9b81f740d71c7b1/cd4a79569b04c199c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a9b81f740d71c7b1/7b413c6ebc5157bfc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

body:

Friend,

It's Primary Day! If you haven't already voted for John Carney for Governor, make sure you vote [at your polling place](https://act.myngp.com/el/uQ8OS1_ndP9OcKYKoXNy7Q==/wiA50jqmlW7wUU7PdXW0WQ==) or drop off your mail-in ballot at a [secure drop box location](https://act.myngp.com/el/uQ8OS1_ndP9OcKYKoXNy7Q==/i90RRhd0YMlxu2AsjESMbw==?amp=1) by 8 PM.

**REMINDER** : Ballots must be in-hand at the Department of Elections by 8 PM today, September 15.

Please contact the voter protection hotline for rides to the polls, questions about polling locations, and more: 1-833-DELDEMS

Thanks for your continued support,

Team Carney

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/uQ8OS1_ndP9OcKYKoXNy7Q==/SdtkFKb-Z-358i3TvcUgaQ==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uQ8OS1_ndP9OcKYKoXNy7Q==/0qu0IKCqNvkVye2ZdIQ8uA==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uQ8OS1_ndP9OcKYKoXNy7Q==/wVk4-5p7xBvuO_eW3EXfbw==)

Paid for by Friends for John Carney

Wilmington DE 19899 United States

## Dear Friend,

This is a reminder that you are invited to attend my **“Farewell to Summer Celebration”** on **Thursday, September 24 th, from 5:30 p.m. to 7:30 p.m.** at the **Town of Wheatfield Lions Club pavilion**. The address for the event is **6535 Ward Rd, Sanborn, NY 14132.**

If you wish to pre-pay for your reservations, please visit [https://secure.winred.com/ortt-for-state-senate/farewelltosummer](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=36b6c7e9b2&e=9f843ba602) and make your selection. The cost of entry is $65 with sponsorships available at $500 and $1,000.

Please see the flyer below for additional details and information for sending in donations via mail. **To RSVP, please email josh@robortt.com.** Can't wait to see you there.

Faithfully Yours,

Rob

We’ve invested heavily in reaching folks with:
✔ Biographical ads about who Josh is, and why he’s the right choice in this race
✔ Direct mail to reach voters at crucial moments in this campaign
✔ Digital ads to target persuadable voters
✔ Traditional organizing to boost turnout (through safe, socially distant efforts!)
**But as we head into the final stretch of the campaign, your support is more important than ever.**
With vote by mail and early voting more common than ever this year, we need to reach voters much earlier and much more often — and it’s going to cost a lot more than a traditional election season.
**In short: what we raise _this week_ will determine our ability to reach folks before they cast their ballots. **
We’ve set a goal of raising $75,000 from our online supporters by the end of the month. Thanks to you, we’ve been able to close the fundraising gap with our opponent, and we were able to start our television and digital ads a week before him.

name: Cory Booker
subject: It’s great to be connected with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Max Rose For Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lnypwZiL3XnBJpBBLY8Sx1EnCgMLLqGE7p9IeWaz5b4=/-ra0z6Yd63ybcWZNAnkGSAV18QVcH_UlpySWUCrE2ro=?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.15_b1_cb_conole&amount=25)
---
| Friends, it's great to be connected.

I'm reaching out today on behalf of my dear friend Max Rose, who I've had the honor to serve alongside in Washington for the past year and a half. Max and I go way back -- far before this team helped send him to Congress, Max actually interned in my office when I was mayor of Newark!

I've got to say, Max is hard to forget. What I remember about him from back then is that there was never an issue not worth his attention or his time. No matter how small the problem, if it mattered to families, he put his whole heart into fixing what wasn't working.

**I see that same fight in him now that he 's representing NY-11 in Congress. His ability to cut through the gridlock and do what's right in order to make progress for the people is why securing his re-election in 2020 is so important.**

**[But as you know, Max is facing off in one of the country's most competitive congressional races, and he needs your help to continue leading. Will you help send Max back to Congress by chipping before his mid-September fundraising deadline tomorrow? >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/lnypwZiL3XnBJpBBLY8Sx1EnCgMLLqGE7p9IeWaz5b4=/-ra0z6Yd63ybcWZNAnkGSAV18QVcH_UlpySWUCrE2ro=?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.15_b1_cb_conole&amount=25)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Proud to have NARAL on #TeamDani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
We’ve got some big news: our campaign has just been endorsed by NARAL Pro-Choice America! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c86a6ec8bea5/help-me-cut-through-the-noise-nonsense-around-voting-3911650?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
We’ve got some big news: our campaign has just been endorsed by NARAL Pro-Choice America!

NARAL has been at the forefront of the fight for the right to choose and I am so proud to be able to count America’s leading pro-choice advocacy group amongst my supporters.

I am especially thankful to have their support as we go up against one of the most devastatingly anti-choice members of Congress. In fact, **my opponent has earned a disappointing score of 0% from NARAL**. He has voted to restrict abortion, called for the full repeal of Roe v. Wade, and voted for a domestic gag rule. He has made it clear that he is committed to stripping away the right to choose. It is infuriating. That is why we can--and must--do so much better. I have always said that the primary lens from which I view the world is as a woman, so my opponent’s radical opposition to the right to choose has me even more committed to defeat him.

[Click here to chip in and help us defeat an anti-choice Congressman.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f6e86098d3&e=140a9b81e7)

Here’s what the President of NARAL has to say about our race: “The stakes for reproductive freedom could not be higher in 2020, as Radical Right politicians across the country continue their relentless campaign to ban abortion and push access to reproductive healthcare as far out of reach as possible. **NARAL is proud to endorse Dani,** **a fierce advocate for reproductive freedom,** in her campaign to unseat an anti-choice, anti-freedom Congressman who for too long has advanced an extreme and out-of-touch ideological agenda.”

It’s important that we have as many pro-choice members of Congress, because the right to choose is a freedom that we cannot afford to lose. When I am elected, I will fight for each and every one of us to have control over our own bodies.

[I hope I can count on you to help us keep this momentum going into the final 49 days of the campaign. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=cea65b1b34&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---

Friend,

Texas Democrats have been fighting for years to flip Texas blue, and I’m thrilled that we’re finally within striking distance. We have an incredible roster of candidates who have been laying the groundwork for the kind of change we need, and I know that if we power down ballot candidates across Texas, we can power Texas to victory and flip it blue.

**One of those candidates is Sri Preston Kulkarni, a foreign service officer and lifelong Texan who’s running an incredible campaign in TX-22.**

[**Sri has what it takes to win his seat, be a part of the movement to flip Texas blue, and become an excellent leader in Congress -- but to get to Congress, he needs your help. Can you chip in now to help him get there?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19171792/251708160/1226323243?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.15_b1_pb_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2FhOTk4Yy03NmY3LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kYeySgtLmNWHyCMVoyz4M0oVWlN9EogWqr0Xv-orRcM=)

name: Preston (Campaign Manager, Team MJ)
subject: Five days ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|

[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f40/7f51f7bc/45784f55/4efa1718/2864373665/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

**Five days ago, Team MJ launched our first wave of TV ads of the general election.** And since in-person events are canceled for public health reasons, we've also been running tons of digital ads.

But running these ads costs money. **_A lot of money._ [Will you consider chipping in today to MJ's TV & Digital Ad Fund? Your donation will help us get our ad in front of more people.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f40/7f51f7bc/45784f55/4efa171f/2864373665/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200915.1nd__2110__&amount=10")**

With the polls tightening and MJ gaining on Sen. Cornyn, we must do _everything in our power_ to reach every last one of these undecided Texans before November 3rd.

Unlike Sen. Cornyn, MJ doesn't have big corporate PACs and special interests like the Koch network bankrolling her. She's counting on y'all. **[Peter, can you contribute to MJ's TV & Digital Ad Fund today? ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f40/7f51f7bc/45784f55/4efa171f/2864373665/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200915.1nd__2110__&amount=10")** Thanks so much,
Preston
Campaign Manager
MJ for Texas
| [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f40/7f51f7bc/45784f55/4efa171f/2864373665/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200915.1nd__2110__&amount=10")
---
** **

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f40/7f51f7bc/45784f55/4efa171e/2864373665/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2110&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f40/7f51f7bc/45784f55/4efa171d/2864373665/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

| | Peter,

Thank you to those who were able to join us for our Virtual Contra Costa Pasta Dinner this past weekend. We raised money for The Food Bank of Contra Costa and Solano and helped support local favorites, The Pasta King, One House Bakery, and Viano Vineyards!

I had a wonderful time chatting with everyone, and was thrilled that Congressman Mark DeSaulnier was able to join us at the event. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19174099/251748653/-1438671915?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYThlNzNiOS04NGY3LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XmqX0GmgrC3YeUElKSCpip9y2OmZX78n9ktKYdSvwqk=&emci=c98e73b9-84f7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=ca8e73b9-84f7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=2678920) Your support means the world to me and to our community, and we hope you enjoyed our new format, dinner at home, and virtually connecting. Keep your eyes peeled for more information so you can join me for more virtual events. Follow us on [**_Facebook_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19174100/251748654/-1438671915?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYThlNzNiOS04NGY3LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XmqX0GmgrC3YeUElKSCpip9y2OmZX78n9ktKYdSvwqk=&emci=c98e73b9-84f7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=ca8e73b9-84f7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=2678920) and [**_Twitter_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19174101/251748655/1860325204?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYThlNzNiOS04NGY3LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XmqX0GmgrC3YeUElKSCpip9y2OmZX78n9ktKYdSvwqk=&emci=c98e73b9-84f7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=ca8e73b9-84f7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=2678920) to stay up to date with what’s happening in your area.

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Friends, Georgia is ground zero to save our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19174440/251751338/-601972897?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ZTVmZGVkLTg1ZjctZWExMS05OWMzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=80VZsEfa6-kFLhXTIuTvYoyh408qvYm1vkI0JchuBo4=&emci=004c1d6f-bdf6-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=38e5fded-85f7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=1919891) Friends, **Georgia is once again the epicenter of the political universe.** Not only has Georgia finally achieved swing state status and become one of the most powerful states in the race for the White House, but because of this year's special election we have the power to shape the entire U.S. Senate. And with the power to shape the Senate comes the power to define the Supreme Court, _**the power to define American Justice itself**_ , for a generation. The fate of the entire country is in our hands, **but what else is new?** This is the birthplace of the civil rights movement, the capitol of hip hop, the home of the superhero blockbuster. **And this November, when we send Donald Trump packing, we’re going to show the entire country the same is true in politics: As Georgia goes, so goes the nation.** _But Friends, it’s about more than the races at the top of the ballot._ _**With your help**_ , we can win the Georgia State House, so the Republicans can’t continue their gerrymandered stranglehold on our state. And that is one of the main reasons we are launching an exciting new organization of devoted democrats and civil rights soldiers—the Georgia Blue Project. [**It is imperative that we flip Georgia and the Georgia Blue Project is how we’re going to do it. Friends, donating $26—a dollar for each State House seat we are targeting—or whatever you can afford today will be invaluable in funding the outreach we need to increase turnout among the communities of color, Independent women and youth whose votes will be decisive in our elections this year. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19174441/251751339/-1947399157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ZTVmZGVkLTg1ZjctZWExMS05OWMzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=80VZsEfa6-kFLhXTIuTvYoyh408qvYm1vkI0JchuBo4=#edit?refcode=91420)
When I ran for U.S. Senate, you were there. My motivation wasn’t only for the opportunity to represent hard working Georgians and their families in Washington. It was also my commitment to building a lasting movement for change across Georgia.
That’s why I’m honored to be joined in this amazing new effort to flip Georgia through the Georgia Blue Project by Judge Glenda Hatchett; Atlanta City Councilman Amir Farokhi; progressive activist Bob Herndon; celebrated civil rights attorney Gerald Griggs; former Attorney General candidate Charlie Bailey; and former GA NAACP President and head of New Georgia Project. **These are the respected, committed Georgians who have joined me in this cause.** The stakes are simply too high for us to sit on the sidelines and not leave everything we’ve got on the playing field. We cannot wake up on November 4th to four more years of Donald Trump. _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19174442/251751340/-618392945?refcode=em091420&express_lane=true&amount=26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ZTVmZGVkLTg1ZjctZWExMS05OWMzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=80VZsEfa6-kFLhXTIuTvYoyh408qvYm1vkI0JchuBo4=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19174443/251751341/-618392945?refcode=em091420&express_lane=true&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ZTVmZGVkLTg1ZjctZWExMS05OWMzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=80VZsEfa6-kFLhXTIuTvYoyh408qvYm1vkI0JchuBo4=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19174444/251751342/-618392945?refcode=em091420&express_lane=true&amount=500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ZTVmZGVkLTg1ZjctZWExMS05OWMzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=80VZsEfa6-kFLhXTIuTvYoyh408qvYm1vkI0JchuBo4=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19174445/251751343/-618392945?refcode=em091420&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ZTVmZGVkLTg1ZjctZWExMS05OWMzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=80VZsEfa6-kFLhXTIuTvYoyh408qvYm1vkI0JchuBo4=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19174446/251751344/-618392945?refcode=em091420&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ZTVmZGVkLTg1ZjctZWExMS05OWMzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=80VZsEfa6-kFLhXTIuTvYoyh408qvYm1vkI0JchuBo4=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19174447/251751345/-618392945?refcode=em091420&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ZTVmZGVkLTg1ZjctZWExMS05OWMzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=80VZsEfa6-kFLhXTIuTvYoyh408qvYm1vkI0JchuBo4=) We must end the lingering effects of the racist and divisive Southern Strategy in Georgia. Donald Trump only won Georgia by 5 points in 2016—and we all know that there is a high likelihood that Stacey Abrams would be our governor today if it wasn’t for the insidious voter purges and suppression we’ve experienced. Since then, over 1.1 million new voters have been added to the voter rolls. We have reached the tipping point—and we are determined to give Georgia a final, decisive push to victory. _**Friends, the past four years of Donald Trump and his Republican enablers have been rough. We have lost 200,000 lives to Donald Trump’s willful mismanagement of the coronavirus pandemic. Our economy is devastated, and still, social justice eludes too many. Black Americans are murdered in the streets by vigilantes, shot in their beds because of “no-knock” warrants, and shot in the back by rogue law enforcement officers sworn to protect us. We have witnessed our very democracy dismantled. We must elect people who insist on solutions. We can change this in 2020.**_ **But we can turn our country and our state around. Please stand with us and support the Georgia Blue Project today.** Yours Truly, Teresa Tomlinson | |

Since then, over 1.1 million new voters have been added to the voter rolls. We have reached the tipping point—and we are determined to give Georgia a final, decisive push to victory. Friends, the past four years of Donald Trump and his Republican enablers have been rough. We have lost 200,000 lives to Donald Trump’s willful mismanagement of the coronavirus pandemic. Our economy is devastated, and still, social justice eludes too many. Black Americans are murdered in the streets by vigilantes, shot in their beds because of “no-knock” warrants, and shot in the back by rogue law enforcement officers sworn to protect us. We have witnessed our very democracy dismantled. We must elect people who insist on solutions. We can change this in 2020._ But we can turn our country and our state around. Please stand with us and support the Georgia Blue Project today. Yours Truly, Teresa Tomlinson | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by GBP, www.georgiablueproject.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Hoosier Republican,

There’s a battle waging in the 5th District. It’s an open seat in a historically red district, but the Democrats are swinging HARD to win this one.

Nancy Pelosi has unleashed her liberal money machine, and Barack Obama has even endorsed the Democratic candidate. We need to fight back now to support conservative rock star Victoria Spartz in this race and keep this seat RED!
KEEP INDIANA RED! (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-spartzrace-090920?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_e_spartzrace_090920&mc_cid=fdc9a9968a&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We don’t rely on deep-pocketed liberal donors from California and New York to fund our get-out-the-vote efforts. Our candidates like Victoria rely almost solely on supporters like you — the hardworking men and women of America who are just trying to do a good day’s work for a decent wage to support their families.

These are the people who will be hurt the most by the Democrats’ socialist agenda, and the people whose rights and freedoms we need to protect in Congress.

Will you please chip in what you can now to help us fight the liberal machine in Indiana?

name: Mike Kelly For Congress
subject: ICYMI: Judge Declares Wolf Unconstitutional!
body:
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.140417.aspx)
Dear Peter,
I am beyond excited to share this news with you!
A Federal Judge just declared Governor Wolf’s shutdown orders unconstitutional!
This is a big win for hardworking Pennsylvanians, many of whose livelihoods were destroyed by Governor Wolf's arbitrary shut down orders. The federal judge's ruling affirms that emergency declarations do not give politicians license to suspend our Constitutional rights.
I know this has been a rough year on all of us, but we have to stay in the battle. Are you with me in this fight? A small donation goes a long way to help me fight for western Pennsylvania’s values in Washington.
**_Thank you for your continued support and God Bless America!_**
My best,
_Mike_
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.140417.aspx)

name: Team Inslee
subject: 31 days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Election Day isn't just on November 3rd.
| Friend, Our mid-month deadline is tomorrow -- but here's another deadline our team is laser-focused on: We're 31 days from the start of voting here in Washington state. Mail-in ballots are nothing new for us, but it does mean we have to be prepared for a marathon, not a sprint. Election Day isn't just November 3rd. It's every day between October 16th and November 3rd, so that means we need to reach voters NOW. **[We set a mid-month goal of $25,000 by midnight tomorrow to help fund our next 31 days: Will you chip in $5 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11173?t=3&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11174?t=4&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11175?t=5&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11176?t=6&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11177?t=7&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11178?t=8&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11173?t=9&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)
---
Thanks,
Team Inslee
\--- Forwarded Message ---
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Mon, Sep 14, 2020
Subject: Republicans have more cash on hand now than in 2016
[](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=10&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)
Friend,
Washingtonians begin voting in just one month -- and I'm feeling a bit of déjà vu.
It feels eerily like back in 2016 when we felt so sure of Democratic victories only to be completely blindsided in November. Republicans have more money on hand than they did then and their sights set on more upsets than in 2016.
The Republican Governors Association has raised more than $200 million since 2018 preparing for this moment. They're ready to use it to unseat the three Democratic governors they're targeting this year. I am one of those targets, and ever since the pandemic started, Donald Trump has had his sights set on Washington state.
**[We don't have many of these deadlines left -- so each and every one really, really matters. In order to reach voters before voting begins, we need to raise $25,000 by midnight on Wednesday. Will you donate $5 or more right now so we can reach voters before Washingtonians prepare to vote?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11173?t=11&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11174?t=12&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11175?t=13&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11176?t=14&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11177?t=15&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11178?t=16&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11173?t=17&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)
---
2016 taught us you can never be too prepared -- because you never know what's coming. No matter what happens in the next two months, I know I can count on you.
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11173?t=18&akid=8149%2E868730%2E_PryTV)

body:
We only have a few hours left before our 11:59 PM deadline. |
---
Friend,

We set a goal of raising $100,000 in FOUR DAYS, _and we are SO CLOSE._

But we only have a few hours left before our 11:59 PM deadline. **[We need your help TONIGHT.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2989/5b2c1286/3988ab24/25f306f5/2258346648/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_15_mm_25k?refcode=em_2020_09_15_mm_25k&amount=30") ** **[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2989/5b2c1286/3988ab24/25f306f4/2258346648/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_15_mm_25k?refcode=em_2020_09_15_mm_25k")** | | **[DONATE $30!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2989/5b2c1286/3988ab24/25f306f5/2258346648/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_15_mm_25k?refcode=em_2020_09_15_mm_25k&amount=30")**

body:

|

| Friend, We have 2 weeks until Q3 comes to an end. We need to make certain it’s a triumphant one! Moms in Office is one of the only PACs fighting exclusively for mothers and families. And thanks to you, we’re doing it well.
But right now, we need your help. Can you help us keep the momentum going? As always, your contribution will go directly to women candidates running for office -- women like Cori Bush-[anointed](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a040539781&e=3f151f8b74), Adrienne Bell in Texas and California’s Chris Bubser.
Please chip in what you can, even[ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=c709431c3e&e=3f151f8b74)[$3](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=6818d778ad&e=3f151f8b74) will get us closer to our goal. Thank you for all of your help! Moms in Office

We need to make certain it’s a triumphant one! Moms in Office is one of the only PACs fighting exclusively for mothers and families. And thanks to you, we’re doing it well. But right now, we need your help. Can you help us keep the momentum going? As always, your contribution will go directly to women candidates running for office -- women like Cori Bush-, Adrienne Bell in Texas and California’s Chris Bubser. Please chip in what you can, even will get us closer to our goal. Thank you for all of your help! Peter,
Last week, Ben Ray Lujan released a new ad where he flat out lied about my support for pre-existing conditions.

This is personal for me. Not only have I been clear about my support for covering pre-existing conditions since day one of this campaign, but my daughter, Ava, has a pre-existing condition and I would never let her down.

YOU ARE ONE OF THE FIRST to hear from my daughter, Ava, and me in my new ad we are airing today. Ben Ray’s dishonest ad has already misled enough New Mexicans. We need your help to ensure every New Mexican that heard Luján lies knows the truth about where I stand on healthcare. And voters also have a right to know that Luján wants a complete government takeover of healthcare that will outlaw employer-based health coverage, eliminate choices for patients, and massively raise taxes on everyone.
If you can, [_please consider contributing $10, $20, or even $50 to my campaign so we can fight back against Ben Ray’s lies and correct the record._](https://u14066317.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=xDqpR0G3DjuYE5JnpHlAmZTdBrgFC3xZepXQi3pi5WBIP0lBK7vph8muRdeP06RjWFwFyfAt4C7sHtrISUYW4-2BBlP5tmnrVlq1fXzv1v-2B9U-3D1kol_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6kuRVaQKTvSh5M3PsTvqIW9senHX4VB1IkiZ1rVouV5hX6EPiIVUUN3Z7u0clUe5r07r2rpKntv1bfJ-2B0K0l2hiYIgCVLN5hkakV-2Fv0gSoV-2BdPNM8fG3mLlYla5Z8FxKvlTk6sJllnLy1YYG8-2BeR5Vg-2FAGGGm7d2V4tU5KpFMmprlRVfzefXaO1-2B9Ko1h6A60IV63KuhdK4zqJRSQBWrHCrISQA0AYQKZFVGKYNAf9yPgRHQXL9KwSQ2tfOPrDUvzmA0ds1zILf8i3L7cGMuNItR5u0tITdDIZdmx3N3oPBhrxpo6-2F7M51fujKrBl4F6wzxA6y-2Fe6cZu93iPofDedMxBUQ-2BKm2EvyuBk0i6Ssl-2BfmaPNDGw1shYQgqam32T0cw3-2BldNk7AY7-2B1Nh4CsiELwo6SJhfMBv9ZTdcMBzopvEDcurVG3b7IvLfuLovM8NDA5TfTc-2Ft5BYHIgHkLqBZqy3AF4DyW-2F3pZApzdvm1YGWto44SlxrrPGfkWlw9oOrcre9vbD96acRSsI5qgz9-2BZ-2Fi4c1ihjAx9SRjiEhlolHPKkoFEeAAJ-2FY36MnqUaOx-2BLFPsAPeQNxESMyrpCm-2FcqrJL2rOygFcDVcapJrGTKkFYmwQapBRB31n36JLxEJyCCIiGpsqQYvnVSeqqUpPvqgQT4eF6OOLFLkyGVTJ8kjWT9bzaD11emATg1GKM3dd3SjulLpbdffwrTcu8GtwKmgmHSE-2FG6qszm66RugEZBzs-2B-2FBHn-2FmIb5ZGKMlA9RSA9TfQyaIYMDX4-2BdKYAabMUU4L0hjwmQfDaGG91Wt-2Fa4LpzRcGsLWrm4rCONLu4Rd1-2Fz0P5z25V87tsC6hAd3nacQ-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Last week, Ben Ray Lujan released a new ad where he flat out lied about my support for pre-existing conditions. This is personal for me. Not only have I been clear about my support for covering pre-existing conditions since day one of this campaign, but my daughter, Ava, has a pre-existing condition and I would never let her down. YOU ARE ONE OF THE FIRST to hear from my daughter, Ava, and me in my new ad we are airing today. or on the image below to watch it now. Ben Ray’s dishonest ad has already misled enough New Mexicans. We need your help to ensure every New Mexican that heard Luján lies knows the truth about where I stand on healthcare. And voters also have a right to know that Luján wants a complete government takeover of healthcare that will outlaw employer-based health coverage, eliminate choices for patients, and massively raise taxes on everyone. If you can, | | | Thank you for your continued support, Mark P.S. Today, we are airing a new ad where I confront Ben Ray’s lies about my healthcare agenda. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO ==

Friend,

Election Day is just 50 days away.

No matter what happens, history will be made on November 3rd, and Nancy Pelosi is working harder than ever to make sure that the history books are written in her favor.

_With time rapidly running out, I need your help to**[stop that from happening.](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=45cd5233616941938ed22591feb9e95d&_e=-T9dUv5jnhyLyzv9Hcfk2k_tCkW-HtjSnRVAbo75wTuuLtpxXsHPGl1F7Uoe44XVTuihO_i09EI5wXoW3p7gBNgt9I5k7YfK1cAe5DRkS9VFmRXeVvd9pbkihdsEWZLQH2Nikntp3cs5f0DL2e8AJ5lxx1g-FMh-EN4xxDT3xVm7PfuSM71_vvQ_qAH5B_gwFRm7nv3GA0nDB9eZYFmhAROr5xZTegcSCi7Jp1Baq16qcbpWlgKSq9sqAkimZvPOKf4CY8eye_n7oKwv2EkC7K08wJJkUapU4wvmVqps80psRDca2_N6zT2TpU0MAMnsSJsYfxpKGersQz-LxMnh1R39yH9Ys7G_Izsz2A5p1MzFsrHLs6Wze-iWVrXetXedW6JCOONpbFcFpCgCLrvMlPOeejzv3yYueOU2isUvP_cH0xrpgGH5qxmlEdAAB9z-IYz3uZondY9pdOOjwdetrwN8p8qiexrVDKVBe7JFKk8%3D)**_

The Chinese Communist Party is getting bolder, our economy still climbing back to full speed, and police officers are under attack every day. Americans need _**bold leaders**_ in Congress moving forward to tackle these problems head-on – and that’s exactly what Pelosi has refused to do.

_**She’s refused to treat the CCP as a serious threat.**_

_**She’s blocked COVID economic stimulus bills again and again over petty politics.**_

_**She’s bowed down to the mobs calling to defund the police.**_

She’s never been more out of touch with the needs of everyday, middle-class Americans – and we only have 50 days left to take the House out of her hands.

clean_body: this is our chance to put Congress back in the right hands Friend, Darin sent you a must-read message earlier this week – and we want to make sure that it didn’t get buried in your inbox. We have less than 50 days left to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi this year. She’s never been more out of touch with the American people, and this is our chance to put Congress back in the right hands. Time isn’t on our side in this race, and that’s why Darin needs to know that you are as we head down the final stretch. Thank you, Team LaHood \- - - Forwarded Message Below - - - From: Darin LaHood Subject: We only have 50 days left To: | | | Friend, Election Day is just 50 days away. No matter what happens, history will be made on November 3rd, and Nancy Pelosi is working harder than ever to make sure that the history books are written in her favor. With time rapidly running out, I need your help to The Chinese Communist Party is getting bolder, our economy still climbing back to full speed, and police officers are under attack every day. Americans need bold leaders in Congress moving forward to tackle these problems head-on – and that’s exactly what Pelosi has refused to do. She’s refused to treat the CCP as a serious threat. She’s blocked COVID economic stimulus bills again and again over petty politics. She’s bowed down to the mobs calling to defund the police. She’s never been more out of touch with the needs of everyday, middle-class Americans – and we only have 50 days left to take the House out of her hands. Friend, if we don’t turn the House red on November 3rd, there’s no telling what America will look like the next time around in 2022. I don’t want to find out. That’s why our campaign is working harder than ever to put America’s future in the right hands this November – but we need your help more than ever before right now. Thank you for running this race with us. Best, Darin LaHood | | | Paid for by LaHood for Congress | | P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e845/77d4c309/21b8cbd9/2635fe45/1023578663/VEsHBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e845/77d4c309/21b8cbd9/2635fe44/1023578663/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e845/77d4c309/21b8cbd9/2635fe47/1023578663/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

name: Jason Yates
subject: Your 2020 party platform guides
body:
| | Peter, National Voter Registration Sunday is just five days away. This Sunday, September 20, 2020, churches across the country will encourage their congregations to register and prepare to vote. You can access all the free non-partisan materials for your church to participate in National Voter Registration Sunday with a virtual or in-person voter drive [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=lROsI8Y7B9BWlZ2-cpdKXIKkeSI4MrcIhR7-Og50mNElvZOspC_AA5USuqBlKgAR&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200915com01&n=1). One of the most requested My Faith Votes resources every election year is our [Party Platform Guide](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iWpC2DEzv9E1TzWlgwOLur_oQQUeQcfaqavA4pEdgZUw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200915com01&n=2). We are excited to release our 2020 editions containing quotes from the Republican, Libertarian, and Democrat platforms on major issues. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iWpC2DEzv9E1TzWlgwOLur_oQQUeQcfaqavA4pEdgZUw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200915com01&n=3) The guides help you to quickly compare the political party stances on the most critical issues. We’ve created a one-page as well as a full party comparison guide that is downloadable and shareable. **Please share these resources with your friends, family, co-workers, and church community in advance of the November elections.** These powerful tools help you open the door to engaging in meaningful conversations with others about how your biblical beliefs inform your vote. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iWpC2DEzv9E1TzWlgwOLur_oQQUeQcfaqavA4pEdgZUw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200915com01&n=4) Thank you for standing with us to equip Christians to vote. We pray these resources are valuable to you. **Pray. Think. Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200915com01&n=5) **_P.S._**_Be sure to check out the_[ _My Faith Votes store_](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=IvZMBMKaWdlCcZaFf2acQCarZ4aAcuP9_AmMx-8QjGc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200915com01&n=6) _which has new t-shirts, books, and our newly released yard signs available for purchase here! Quantities are limited._
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200915com01&n=7)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200915com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN_lnjJXuwm9W1LbYtLdGxMjm5tk5gSII0q4CUWEUH1EM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200915com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200915com01&n=10) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ShFaE4UMkbUbrBGAfRo6cWtpYpG_86vVborl4qh6VMvTodsDIy60QzMHxkiHaL0UXpB3C5GFDWiEmkpisLd3BpmWcMBxsv4tZZBXg91jBhs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200915com01&n=11) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200915com01&n=12)

subject: Bahrain-Israel Deal Shows Why Trump Deserves Nobel Peace Prize
body:
"President Trump deserves the Nobel Peace Prize for his efforts to establish peaceful relations between Israel and its Arab neighbors, which took a... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c9d3effcc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Bahrain-Israel Deal Shows Why Trump Deserves Nobel Peace Prize**

Today, President Trump is welcoming the Prime Minister of Israel and the Foreign Ministers of Bahrain and the United Arab Emirates to sign the historic Abraham Accords at the White House.

“President Trump deserves the Nobel Peace Prize for his efforts to establish peaceful relations between Israel and its Arab neighbors, which took a big step forward Friday with the announcement that Israel and Bahrain will establish diplomatic ties,” Rabbi Abraham Cooper writes for Fox News.

After 72 years with only two peace deals involving Israel, President Trump has now helped complete two such agreements in just the past month.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eb3b577e34&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.foxnews.com/opinion/bahrain-israel-rabbi-abraham-cooper")
---
|
---
| “Crews of two California Army National Guard helicopters were awarded the nation’s highest flying honors Monday for their dangerous rescue of hundreds of Mammoth Pool campers trapped by the Creek Fire. President Donald Trump presented each of the seven crew members the Distinguished Flying Cross, which recognizes extraordinary heroism in flight,” Tara Copp reports for [_The Sacramento Bee_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fd8cebfe5d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “A vaccine for Covid-19 could emerge in the next several months,” write former FDA Commissioners Scott Gottlieb and Mark McClellan. While American scientists and doctors work quickly toward a vaccine under Operation Warp Speed, there will be no cutting corners. “The FDA’s career experts have publicly and clearly affirmed their commitment to the gold standard for review.” Read more in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=31292fe6cb&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The two-decade-long crime decline appears to have conclusively plateaued,” Charles Lehman writes. “That suggests that there is more work to be done on cutting violent crime in the United States. Progressives, however, have in recent months agitated for policies that would push the needle in the opposite direction.” Read more in [_The Washington Free Beacon_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b261d5df0f&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy=20Downing?=
subject: Thank you Vice President Pence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Yesterday, I had the honor of speaking to hundreds of hardworking Montanans at the Mike Pence rally.** **I spoke of the need to defend our law enforcement, our values, and our Constitution. But, at one point during my speech, I mentioned how impactful it’s been having a business leader in the White House. ** **The response was resounding. ** **Myself, President Trump, Senator Daines, Matt Rosendale, and Greg Gianforte all come from the private sector. We have signed the front of a check. ** **President Trump has shown what happens when we elect a business leader to office. ** **Montana needs to follow this example. ** **Tonight at midnight is our quarterly fundraising deadline. ** _**If you believe Montana needs more elected officials with a business background in office please donate before midnight tonight. **_ **The Democrats have nominated a litany of insiders, politicians, and lawyers. The GOP is the party of prosperity and our statewide candidates could not be a better example of that commitment. ** **A businessman built the greatest economy we’ve seen. We can do it again with bold leadership and proven experience.** _**Please Donate Now. Montana can’t risk career politicians calling the shots this January. **_

**Thank you,
Troy**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Christianna=20Dyer=2C=20Team=20Dani?=
subject: Your weekly #TeamDani update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e585a107c15c/your-weekly-teamdani-update?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello to our fantastic Team Dani, **ELECTION COUNTDOWN: 49 DAYS!**
* We have a **NEW GOAL** : to fill the Capital One Arena in DC next to Dani’s soon to be office on Capitol Hill.

****
UPDATES:
* We had another fantastic Weekend of Action! In just one weekend, **you contacted 4,336 people on the phone!**
* **MVP** of the second Weekend of Action goes to: **Josh F**. who made **606** of those calls in just 3 days!
* We cannot thank you guys enough for all of your hard work. We’ve still got work to do-let’s keep up the momentum to flip this seat in November!
* **AND WE’RE DOING IT AGAIN THIS WEEKEND!!!!**

SIGN UP HERE: [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScuVe5e0i9FAiLnU4XW2TGVqO3MWU4XYPBd6yzaDJMMtaMaLg/viewform](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=78aa70c091&e=140a9b81e7)
* In the next two months, we are kicking off a HUGE Letter to the Editor (LTE) writing campaign. **LTEs are the perfect way to get involved,** especially if phone banking is not your thing, or you don't have enough time to commit to a big stack of postcards - we can do it together! Please sign up below!
* [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdeZa5kMbfSI9bWXnbo-3wpD_HPjpdzOXlxoIERo1vR_eUO3Q/viewform](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=43132cbaf0&e=140a9b81e7)

Some things to stay tuned for...:
* **The Park Tours coming to you...**
* _Join us for another stop on our IL-16 park tour! Come out for a safe and socially distanced meet and greet with Dani Brzozowski, the Democratic nominee for Congress in IL-16. Ask Dani any questions you have about her campaign, and get to know more about what she stands for! Masks are required. We will provide water and cookies. _

This week we have socially distanced meet and greets at:
* September 16
* Peck Park Meet and Greet!
* Wed 4 PM
* Peck Park, Ottawa, IL
* September 20
* Powers Park Meet and Greet!
* Sun 1:30 PM
* Powers Park, Rochelle, IL
* September 20
* Amboy City Park Meet and Greet!
* Sun 4:30 PM
* Amboy City Park, Amboy, IL
* September 21
* Centennial Park Meet and Greet!
* Mon 5:30 PM
* Centennial Park, Peru, IL

A few standing reminders:
* While you’re still on the phone finishing phone banking, **CALL YOUR FRIENDS!** Everyone in your social circles has the potential to be an activist and volunteer right alongside you - you never know unless you ask! Grab a friend to sign up for a Weekend of Action shift!
* Want to be featured as a Volunteer Voice columnist? If you have helpful tips on effective outreach, send them my way!

Christianna Dyer
Digital Organizer, Team Dani
---

| Hi , In the U.S. Senate, every piece of legislation needs to receive 60 votes to overcome the filibuster and end debate on the issue. Kamala Harris and other liberals call the filibuster a relic. They have voiced their support for eliminating the filibuster altogether so they can enact a liberal agenda. **But those same Senate Democrats just filibustered our Republican covid relief bill!** Senate Democrats just blocked the replenishment of the Paycheck Protection Program, which would help millions of American small businesses keep their employees. [**I need your help to keep fighting these liberals to get this bill passed. Send a quick $25 donation to our campaign right now.**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTEwODkyMzI2NTY4ODU5MzEwJmM9czViNCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDkzNzY1MzQmZD1lNmwxcDhq.OhfeS82NptOuSdw0i6M3wWMjy_77j0S1mVqwFONSWWY)

Friend,

We just hit a huge milestone.

_Today marks 50 days until Election Day_
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=782e7c90aff949a4b1138a0bf5ae5caf&_e=MrXfXphCRT8oZvKybD0tjF6ve-zn-ATpcx6VfKVEJ_FtEwqF7hz2leMWNZxb-mmlDSnQM5-tOusf53TnF6udkGoN0Nk4fbFQyzSqiIFQfqk6r94u6-rwCjgfsK2XWr1gZuXGQ35oty-eFWy4Af-QBklazp5VnTYtdOvl1soIBoO8q5Npw2F9mg4OmihnLA4U-9as9Kr_hifkx5MlVHYiKq-8W0OtY4H44uPicX5ZWfwuafUuc1S9bIeBWRzCXIEfacOcM0qOPy9pDw-uZSZ7oYASOzQrZSjUsTDzRFEL7UHMOQJUHcx3S965k-Pz-s5T741OeoQB_pjYZQUuZU9VxTH650_Me16aCtF-ZFME-SoMhE3N0uLzF8qsVz9z_OJHOvvir7myvS0dA3M9plDpYC7Dc5qKhA9VIhK7y-4bTg_vVx53wDZ63UwdTgXXTfV0Firop1LidHCaytNpTjOkmQW1QSUuxMAHDABuaZMvHmY%3D)
We can’t believe it, but November 3rd is right around the corner.

**That’s right, in less than two months you’ll get to cast a ballot for Governor Holcomb and make your voice heard as part of the team that’s building One Indiana for All. **

We won’t mince words.

It’s an important election and it’s crucial to continue supporting Governor Holcomb if we want to get Indiana back to not just setting records -- but breaking them.

**Setting more economic records, delivering more results for Hoosier students, continuing to build upon the best infrastructure in the whole country — that all must continue past November 3rd. **

That’s why we’re reaching out today.

Friend, can we count on you to vote for Eric? If so, you can pledge your vote below.

clean_body: There are officially less than 50 days left until Election Day, and we’re in an all-out sprint to re-elect Governor Holcomb and keep building... Friend, Did you see our team’s note yesterday? There are officially less than 50 days left until Election Day, and we’re in an all-out sprint to re-elect Governor Holcomb and keep building One Indiana for All. We need every Hoosier who wants to see more economic records broken, more roads finished, and a bright future for Indiana to put some skin in the game. Will you chip in and help us finish strong? Donate any amount below. Thank you for your support, Jake Oakman -Holcomb Crew \- - - Forwarded Message Below - - - From: Holcomb Crew Subject: re: 50 days left To: | | | | ---|---|--- | Friend, We just hit a huge milestone. Today marks 50 days until Election Day We can’t believe it, but November 3rd is right around the corner. That’s right, in less than two months you’ll get to cast a ballot for Governor Holcomb and make your voice heard as part of the team that’s building One Indiana for All. We won’t mince words. It’s an important election and it’s crucial to continue supporting Governor Holcomb if we want to get Indiana back to not just setting records -- but breaking them. Setting more economic records, delivering more results for Hoosier students, continuing to build upon the best infrastructure in the whole country — that all must continue past November 3rd. That’s why we’re reaching out today. Friend, can we count on you to vote for Eric? If so, you can pledge your vote below. Thank you for your support — we’re counting on you. name: Leslie Adames
subject: Join us in celebrating Latinx Heritage month!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTO LATINO
body:
Latinx Heritage month is here! |
#
Hey Peter,

Latinx Heritage month is here! Today is the start of a month-long celebration where we honor our community and our culture. | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19177552/251814815/-1436032787?refcode=20200915&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTdlMmQ5ZC05YWY3LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0gnXOQZD2yBOtzZiK_FudwHY09P5kWMR2YZtU-ne2Ek=)**
---
Here at Voto Latino, we are proud everyday to highlight and uplift the beauty, strength, and diversity of our people. This is a critical time for our community, and we need to make sure that we don’t leave any voters behind. Together, **we can** change this country.

It's because of contributions from people like **you** that Voto Latino is able to register Latinxs from all over the country and bring our unique voices to the voting booth.
[Donate to register more Latinx voters](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19177553/251814816/-1436032787?refcode=20200915&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTdlMmQ5ZC05YWY3LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0gnXOQZD2yBOtzZiK_FudwHY09P5kWMR2YZtU-ne2Ek=)
---
As we celebrate our Latinidad, we can’t understate the importance of the Latinx vote! With less than 50 days to go until Election Day, we have to make sure that we’re heard and represented at the voting booth. There are 28.8 million eligible Latinx voters and 10.2 million are currently registered. Our goal is to close that gap and register 200,000 more voters by election day. **We’ve already registered 300,000 voters this election cycle!**

[**Peter, this is the most important election of our lifetime! Can you pitch in $15 to help us register and mobilize a voter?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19177554/251814817/-1436032787?refcode=20200915&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTdlMmQ5ZC05YWY3LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0gnXOQZD2yBOtzZiK_FudwHY09P5kWMR2YZtU-ne2Ek=)

Thank you,

Leslie Adames
Digital Associate
PAID FOR BY VOTO LATINO
---
Voto Latino
PO Box 35608
Washington, DC 20033
United States

Peter,

As the race tightens, **Sen. Cornyn 's DC bosses are getting more and more nervous about his chances.** They've seen how MJ started out over ten points behind but has closed the gap to **just one point!**

So now Sen. Cornyn's handlers have started shoveling money into this race and working to bail out their puppet. Mitch McConnell, the Koch network, the NRA, Ted Cruz, Donald Trump Jr. -- they're trying _everything_ to keep their guy in the Senate.

We need to fight back against their ads and their money, and that means counting on you -- our grassroots army -- to pitch in, fight back, close the gap, and FLIP THE SENATE this November!

subject: how we keep Virginia blue.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
how we keep Virginia blue
|
---

| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dace/53d9897e/55f23a0e/1c880ca4/785509649/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-10k?refcode=20200915_f_1_nd__783__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---

**GOAL: $10,000**
[Support Mark Warner](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dace/53d9897e/55f23a0e/1c880ca3/785509649/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-10k?refcode=20200915_f_1_nd__783__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")
---
Derek:

September marks the end of the last quarter before the election. It's a huge fundraising milestone and the homestretch of this campaign. It's critical that we demonstrate support for Mark Warner across the Commonwealth. **[Can you help us show strong support for Mark by pitching in today?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dace/53d9897e/55f23a0e/1c880ca2/785509649/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-10k?refcode=20200915_f_1_nd__783__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Of course, we'd love to think that Virginia was a "safe" blue state -- but our team remembers Mark's election in 2014, where he won by less than 1%. The polling in that race indicated that his seat was safe, but the election was decided by just 17,000 votes.

**And you can bet that the GOP remembers that, too.** That's why they're investing in the Commonwealth to help Donald Trump win here and help Mark's opponent unseat Mark in the Senate.

We need to protect the progress we've made here. Right now, every dollar counts as we try to show Mark's broad base of support across the Commonwealth. **Can you help us reach our $10,000 fundraising goal by midnight?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dace/53d9897e/55f23a0e/1c880ca1/785509649/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-10k?express_lane=true&refcode=20200915_f_1_nd__783__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5") | [DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dace/53d9897e/55f23a0e/1c880ca0/785509649/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-10k?express_lane=true&refcode=20200915_f_1_nd__783__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")
[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dace/53d9897e/55f23a0e/1c880caf/785509649/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-10k?express_lane=true&refcode=20200915_f_1_nd__783__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25") | [DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dace/53d9897e/55f23a0e/1c880cae/785509649/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-10k?express_lane=true&refcode=20200915_f_1_nd__783__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" | "" "" | "" "" | "" Thank you, Bruce, Team Warner Campaign Manager "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas?=
subject: UPDATE: New Endorsement, New Website, Upcoming Event, & Lawn Signs!
body:
With just 48 days left until election day, I'm excited to share several new developments on the campaign! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/campaign-update-9-15-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=b2fe5567cf&e=4f010155df)
---
| _**Will Douglas for State House Campaign Update**_
---
| | **✅ Endorsed by the TMPA 🚓 ** Today I am proud to announce that our campaign has been endorsed by the Texas Municipal Police Association, the largest law enforcement association in Texas. In the legislature, I will always support support our police and back the blue so that we can keep our communities safe.

_"Will Douglas knows that a strong economy and the ability to build a business begins with safe communities. The Texas Municipal Police Association looks forward to working with Douglas to ensure the safety of every Texan and the people of House District 113." - TMPA_
---
|
---
|
---
| **🌐 New Website 🌐**
---
| Earlier this week we launched a new, refreshed website with an issues page, endorsements, and more... check it out at [www.WillDouglasForTexas.com](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=8c80f9775c&e=4f010155df) and let me know if that "Donate" button is working properly! 🤠
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=30c6cb167d&e=4f010155df)
---
|
---
| **🇺🇸 Yard Signs Are In! 🇺🇸** We're building the biggest grassroots army that Texas' 113th House District has ever seen, and we want you to be a part of it! Show your friends and neighbors that you support our campaign by placing a yard sign on your front lawn!

You can pick one up anytime at our office at 4111 Main Street in Rowlett or request one here: [willdouglasfortexas.com/volunteer/](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=245f9877fa&e=4f010155df) and we'll get one delivered to you!
---
|
---
|
---
| **🌎 Latinos for Will Douglas - Super Saturday 🎊** Come kick off the first Saturday of National Hispanic Heritage Month with our launch of the Latinos for Will Douglas coalition! We will start block-walking at 9:15am and meet up for lunch at 1:30pm. RSVP to [ChristianAndzel22@gmail.com](mailto:ChristianAndzel22@gmail.com?subject=Will%20Douglas%20-%20Super%20Saturday). ¡Nos vemos allí!
---
|
---
|
---
| **👍 Contribute 💸** With just 49 days until election day, we need all the help we can get to win this seat. There are two main ways you can contribute:

1\. [DONATE](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=ed84f4373d&e=4f010155df) \- we have a HUGE fundraising deadline coming up on September 24th, and we're still $37,500 short of our goal. Can you chip in $20, $250, or even $1,000 today to help us get there? Campaigns are expensive and your support will help us fund the advertising we need to air across the district to win. You can donate online by [CLICKING HERE](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=fd11fdcff4&e=4f010155df) or by writing a check to PO Box 496955, Garland, TX 75043.

2\. [VOLUNTEER](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=a87886b071&e=4f010155df) \- I'm out block-walking every single day but I can't reach every household by myself. I'm thankful to have an amazing team of volunteers helping me - and I'd love to have you join us. Fill out on the volunteer form on our website by [CLICKING HERE](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=1ae7e0e037&e=4f010155df) if you'd like to get involved block-walking, making phone calls, or delivering signs. Thank you!
---
|
---
| **🚪 Photos from the Field! 📞** We’re proud to have built a true grassroots campaign. Thanks to our awesome volunteers, we’ve knocked on nearly 20,000 doors in the past five weeks! Check out some of our pics from the field below...
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
| Will Douglas
_Republican Nominee for TX-HD-113_
---
| [DONATE](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=905a6e2809&e=4f010155df "DONATE")
---

---
| | [](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=d2c65c618e&e=4f010155df)

| | [](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=91d6bfcac8&e=4f010155df)
---
|

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Will Douglas for TexasPO Box 496955Garland, TX 75049-6955
[Add us to your address book](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a&e=4f010155df) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a&e=4f010155df&c=12ca698fdf).
