name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Rx for Seniors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | Dear , The price of prescription drugs has risen beyond belief. A person should not have to decide between eating, providing shelter or purchasing much needed medicine. Did you know that the Pharmacy Benefits Manager is a position in the Commonwealth of PA that directly impacts the PRICE of prescription drugs? It's time to hold them as well as the rest of Big Pharma ACCOUNTABLE for the survival of our seniors and underserved communities. Once elected Auditor, I will make it my duty to protect our seniors and ensure that they receive the lowest possible price for prescription drugs. "Leave No One Behind" is not just my mantra, its the way we will govern! name: Sandy Smith
subject: Voting Irregularities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iGNoOqn6f3Nxmng&b=9c5EJx_kdG9Ljc8W3_eaGQ)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am in a tight race in a CLOSE swing district- and that's why I'm writing urgently to ask for your help. **

You've heard President Trump warn of the dangers of massive mail-in balloting. And he's absolutely right.
Think of it this way: _would YOU put $500 cash in an envelope and mail it to yourself? If not, why would you trust the Postal Service to deliver your ballot, your voice?_
President Trump's words on this topic are prescient:
_"So now the Democrats are using Mail Drop Boxes, which are a voter security disaster. Among other things, they make it possible for a person to vote multiple times. Also, who controls them, are they placed in Republican or Democrat areas? They are not Covid sanitized. A big fraud!"_
So we don't trust the Democrat mail in vote schemes. But many people have requested ballots- and we must fight for their votes!
_**In my district alone, 758,057 voters have requested mail in ballots (supposedly). That's a lot of voters who will be receiving their ballots next week- so they need to hear from me, RIGHT NOW!**_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iGNoOqn6f3Nxmng&b=EU8spIutVuSOLqHxknYvEA)
---

**_In Georgia, over 1,000 voters voted BOTH by mail AND in person!_**

_As many as 1,000 Georgians may have cast ballots in the June primary both by mail and in person, Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger said Tuesday, raising questions about how well poll workers in the state are enforcing safeguards._

_Raffensperger’s office is investigating whether those who voted twice did so intentionally and whether two votes were actually counted in each case. Georgia’s June 9 primary was plagued by widespread problems with the delivery of mail ballots and long lines at the polls._

_Raffensperger’s office acknowledged that many voters may have shown up in person because they were afraid that their mail ballots would not be counted._

_WE NEED URGENTLY TO ADVERTISE TO THESE VOTERS NEXT WEEK, AND TO MAKE SURE THAT PEOPLE DO NOT VOTE TWICE!_

[Can you help?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iGNoOqn6f3Nxmng&b=9c5EJx_kdG9Ljc8W3_eaGQ)

I need you to help me beat this vicious leftist machine here in North Carolina. I stand with our President. Our people need to know who to vote for and how to do it- and for that I need your help!

**Pelosi's Democrats are trying to steal this thing. I'm facing her Deputy Whip- and they won't give up easy. I've fought him tooth and nail to this point, and I can pull this off, but only with your help!**

[If you agree with me, I need your help to beat Pelosi's deputy whip Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iGNoOqn6f3Nxmng&b=9c5EJx_kdG9Ljc8W3_eaGQ) Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I want an accurate vote- no double voting allowed! This is a crazy year, but let's make sure the right people win!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iGNoOqn6f3Nxmng&b=9c5EJx_kdG9Ljc8W3_eaGQ), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield;s record is awful, but to replace him I [really need you today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iGNoOqn6f3Nxmng&b=9c5EJx_kdG9Ljc8W3_eaGQ)! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iGNoOqn6f3Nxmng&b=9c5EJx_kdG9Ljc8W3_eaGQ)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iGNoOqn6f3Nxmng&b=9c5EJx_kdG9Ljc8W3_eaGQ)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iGNoOqn6f3Nxmng&b=9c5EJx_kdG9Ljc8W3_eaGQ) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsrEwcLJxM) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsrEwcLJxM)

name: Bill Olson
subject: Far-Left violent mob shoots and nearly kills two police officers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWgBMU6YmF6OuRU&b=_Od2em1ZX8NP3OCx.KGTAQ

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I spent 27 years in the U.S, Army, and I will not stand by while armed liberal execution mobs target police! I will not let the media's concocted lies about police supposedly being racist excuse the execution-style leftist targeting of cops!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWgBMU6YmF6OuRU&b=_Od2em1ZX8NP3OCx.KGTAQ

The far-Left media has whipped the Leftist rioters into such a frenzy that they think they are justified in carrying out execution-style murders of innocent cops.

Two Los Angeles County sheriff's deputies are fighting for their lives after they were shot multiple times at point-blank range in an ambush, authorities said.

Crowds of protesters blocked the entrance to St. Francis Medical Center in Lynwood, where the wounded officers were in a critical condition, police said. Some protesters chanted "we hope they die," the Los Angeles County Sheriff's Office said on Twitter. A witness told ABC7 that some had tried to break into the hospital's emergency room.

The shooting happened at around 7 p.m. Saturday at the Metro Blue Line station at Willowbrook Avenue and Compton Boulevard, not far from the Compton sheriff's station.

The Los Angeles County Sheriff's department shared video of the incident in a post on Twitter that shows a person open fire through the passenger-side window of the patrol car in Compton.

That's not all. It wasn't just that a bunch of murderous social justice warriors tried to kill innocent police officers.

A violent mob of woke liberals also blocked the emergency entrances to a hospital to ensure the deputies that were shot would die.

In a tweet late on Saturday night, the sheriff's department said protesters were blocking the entrance and exit to the hospital the wounded deputies were at.

"To the protesters blocking the entrance & exit of the HOSPITAL EMERGENCY ROOM yelling "We hope they die" referring to 2 LA Sheriff's ambushed today in #Compton: DO NOT BLOCK EMERGENCY ENTRIES & EXITS TO THE HOSPITAL," the tweet said. "People's lives are at stake when ambulances can't get through."

The sheriff's department later said deputies had issued a dispersal order for an unlawful assembly.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWgBMU6YmF6OuRU&b=_Od2em1ZX8NP3OCx.KGTAQ

Is this the America we know and want? A violent mob of Leftists trying to make sure people they shot actually die?

This is California. It's place that has long lost its way, full of hateful and spiteful far-Left ideologues.

Murderers.

I think President Trump should declare the state a disaster and take over its governance. It is clear these people have no self control or ability to protect their own people.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWgBMU6YmF6OuRU&b=_Od2em1ZX8NP3OCx.KGTAQ

It is abundantly clear- the far-Left actively hates us and wants to harm us. And that is who controls the Democrat party.

Here's the good news: The American people see this. They are rallying behind our American President- and that includes military and veterans like me!

If we don't want the murderous gangs of the far Left to have power, we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWgBMU6YmF6OuRU&b=_Od2em1ZX8NP3OCx.KGTAQ

Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". The last time she did this, Steve Scalise got shot by one of her followers! We have to fight if we don't want to be treated like this!

I have taken an oath to the United States Constitution, defending her against all foes foreign OR domestic! I am a veteran and a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWgBMU6YmF6OuRU&b=_Od2em1ZX8NP3OCx.KGTAQ

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the media!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWgBMU6YmF6OuRU&b=_Od2em1ZX8NP3OCx.KGTAQ

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWgBMU6YmF6OuRU&b=_Od2em1ZX8NP3OCx.KGTAQ
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWgBMU6YmF6OuRU&b=_Od2em1ZX8NP3OCx.KGTAQ
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWgBMU6YmF6OuRU&b=_Od2em1ZX8NP3OCx.KGTAQ

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWgBMU6YmF6OuRU&b=_Od2em1ZX8NP3OCx.KGTAQ

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWgBMU6YmF6OuRU&b=_Od2em1ZX8NP3OCx.KGTAQ
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWgBMU6YmF6OuRU&b=_Od2em1ZX8NP3OCx.KGTAQ
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: Rev. Lennox Yearwood Jr.
subject: Why would a brother like me choose to get arrested like that?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
I'm in it to win it.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=2803%2E53494%2EenoEql) Friend, This winter, I was arrested with Bill McKibben and other climate activists for occupying a Chase Bank near the White House -- part of our "Stop the Pipeline" campaign to pressure banks to stop investing in projects that destroy the planet. Three young Black men shared the jail cell with us. They couldn't believe it when I told them we were in there for occupying a bank. | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/913?t=3&akid=2803%2E53494%2EenoEql)
---
I could read it in their faces: Why would a brother like me choose to get arrested like that?
I chose it for the same reason I chose to join the advisory board of Evergreen Action: because climate justice and racial justice are so deeply intertwined. Fossil fuel emissions are heating up our planet and polluting Black, Brown, and Indigenous neighborhoods generation after generation -- while these same communities are subject to excessive policing day in and day out. Now, as wildfires consume a whole coast, communities of color bear an additional respiratory burden. Pollution, policing, wildfires, and a pandemic: They're all keeping us from breathing free.
So we demand change, even if it means going to jail.
**[The fight for racial and climate justice is long and arduous, but I'm in it to win it. If you are, too, add your name to show your support.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/913?t=4&akid=2803%2E53494%2EenoEql)**
You've heard it before, but I'll say it again: We cannot achieve climate justice without racial justice, and we cannot achieve racial justice without climate justice.
All people deserve to drink clean water, breathe clean air, eat healthy food, and live without fear of violence. Securing these rights for ourselves and our children is a struggle we have to get right, and we can get right -- by fighting for racial justice and climate justice at the same time.
**[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/913?t=5&akid=2803%2E53494%2EenoEql)**
**[The bigger our movement, the stronger we'll be. Sign on to show your support for ending violence and injustice against Black, Brown, and Indigenous people in all of its forms.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/913?t=6&akid=2803%2E53494%2EenoEql)**
Thank you,
Rev. Lennox Yearwood Jr.
Evergreen Advisory Board Member
[ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/913?t=7&akid=2803%2E53494%2EenoEql)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2803%2E53494%2EenoEql). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

subject: She’s running ads
body:
Radical Democrat Lois Frankel still refuses to say my name.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-393097-926183-5191995-5d1750f395-8e2ee79076)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-393097-926183-5191995-5d1750f395-8e2ee79076) Radical Democrat Lois Frankel still refuses to say my name.

But last week, she acknowledged that I’m forcing her to run a “full campaign.”

Well, good for her, **Lazy Lois is finally willing to put in a little work**.

I’m sure she’s not happy about it.

Frankel sees Florida’s 21st Congressional Seat as HER seat. She believes she’s entitled to it.

Typical Establishment Democrat . . .

Frankel is now running ads saying, “These are tough times, and Donald Trump is only making it worse.”

She then goes on to say that she’s “protecting Seniors by safeguarding Social Security & Medicare.”

What has she done? Uhhhhh, zip.

And I hate to break it to Lazy Lois, but the only way to safeguard Social Security & Medicare is with these three things: **JOBS, JOBS, JOBS!**

But here was the kicker in her ad: Lois Frankel pledged that “Quality health care is a RIGHT for ALL of US!”

And she wasn’t kidding when she said “ALL OF US”. **Lois Frankel co-sponsored a bill to provide FREE HEALTH CARE TO ILLEGAL ALIENS!**

[**Help me counter Lois Frankel’s network ads with a message that tells the truth.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-393097-926183-5191995-5d1750f395-8e2ee79076)

**Lois Frankel has done NOTHING for our Seniors!**

While our Senior Citizens are struggling to pay for their prescriptions due to the price spikes that linger with ObamaCare, Frankel literally sponsored a bill to give away THOUSANDS in benefits to every illegal alien crossing the border.

As our Seniors struggle to pay their utility bills, what was Lois Frankel doing? She was tied up pursuing the “Russia Hoax” to impeach President Trump.

Frankly, Florida’s Seniors have had enough of Lois Frankel. [**Help me send her packing.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-393097-926183-5191995-5d1750f395-8e2ee79076)

[**By Friday, we have to raise $62,000 to fund our next campaign blitz to compete against Frankel’s war chest.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-393097-926183-5191995-5d1750f395-8e2ee79076)

[**Donate now and help us reach 400 voters with every $10 you contribute.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-393097-926183-5191995-5d1750f395-8e2ee79076)

Help us send a message to Washington and the nation, by doing something they said couldn’t be done . . . **by winning President Trump’s home district**.

[**Donate all you can today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-393097-926183-5191995-5d1750f395-8e2ee79076)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

body:

I’ll keep this brief. I reached out to you yesterday.
There are now less than **50 DAYS** to the election, and I have to meet every fundraising goal to continue my fight. My opponent, Jackie Gordon, is being funded by Nancy Pelosi and the Democrat Machine, which means she will have _**MILLIONS**_ to spend on this race.
I, on the other hand, am running a grassroots campaign that is funded by the people who live here, work here, and grew up here, not by D.C and Hollywood liberals. That means every donation I receive goes a long way in helping me stay in this fight.

name: Margaret Good
subject: tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friend,

I’m reaching out to you one last time before our mid-month deadline at midnight to see if you can help us reach our must-hit goal, so we can stay on track before our last end-of-quarter deadline of the election!

My team just told me that we are only $3,450 away from reaching our goal, and I believe we can reach it, because I believe in you. We need to show Vern Buchanan’s corporate PAC-funded campaign that they are no match for our campaign that’s powered by the people.

Any amount you can contribute right now will go directly towards our critical voter outreach efforts, so we can flip this seat from red to blue, bring accountability to Washington, and bring real change to Florida and our nation.

Please use this link to rush a donation before midnight: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/margaretgoodfl16](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19179518/251857979/1073285021?refcode2=959ed160-abf7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=2ec2d7d3-eef6-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=959ed160-abf7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=091520-es-mm-fr-series-8-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTllZDE2MC1hYmY3LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JPkJvx5rGGnfWLoV6HJ5EzV9J4cB3QH3YsUaDnhYYas=)**

Thank you for all you do.

Margaret

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
---
Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. name: =?utf-8?Q?Preston=20Thompson?=
subject: It’s true
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dana Barrett for Congress**
body:
Did you know that Loudermilk has missed 56.2% of roll calls |
---
| | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=de8bb14dd0&e=e25784ff28)
---
| | Hey Team ,
Did you know that Loudermilk has missed 56.2% of roll calls? It’s true and that means he’s _not_ voting in Congress which is _not_ what a representative should be doing. **Our representative should be focused on us, not on pleasing Trump.** They should be making choices based on what our district wants and needs, not because Trump says so.
And now, we’re just _seven weeks away from our November election_ and flipping Georgia’s 11th district from red to blue.
[**It’s time to kick this campaign into overdrive, can you commit to a weekly recurring donation? Every dollar counts! **](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=af11e70316&e=e25784ff28)
| **[DONATE $11 WEEKLY](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=60c3982938&e=e25784ff28)**
---
**[DONATE $11 ONCE](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=181e4ef6f2&e=e25784ff28)**
---

When Dana first started her campaign we knew that this was going to be an uphill battle, but Dana is not one to back away from a fight. She saw Loudermilk’s neglect of our district and she’s doing something about it.

But Team , let me be straight with you. At the end of September we’re going to have our last End of Quarter deadline before the election. All of our fundraising will be reported, and the GOP will be checking in to see if Dana is the threat we know she is and they will up their game.

**[That’s why we need you to commit to a weekly donation. With just 7 weeks until the election we need to make sure that we are firing on all cylinders. We have come too far to come up short now.](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=19114a769d&e=e25784ff28) **

**[DONATE $11 WEEKLY](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=bf6b9db535&e=e25784ff28)**
---
**[DONATE $11 ONCE](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=4652c8f46c&e=e25784ff28)**
---

Thanks for being a part of this journey!
\-- Preston

name: Sri, me, Paul Begala (3)
subject: building our team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

Paul Begala is right. We must fight together to flip Texas blue and build real change starting in our own community.

**Democrats all across this state have built a strong infrastructure, are engaging every day with the communities that make up this diverse state, and are ready to win in November.**

I’m proud to count myself as a part of the fight to flip Texas blue and champion the issues that matter, from expanding access to affordable health care to making sure our government finally works for working people.

But friend, mail-in ballots will be in the hands of voters in a matter of days, and I need your support as we meet the moment and power our campaign through the last 49 days of this cycle.

Chip in now to join us: [**secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19179671/251864227/1226323243?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.15_b2_smpb3_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGIyYWFkYS1hZWY3LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-yrALocym0-Xh_Qyb8YdGbzPkQzFTFCXaNGRf2b5Ts=)

Thanks for being a part of this,

Sri

\---

On September 15, 2020, Paul Begala wrote:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19179672/251864228/1226323243?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.15_b2_smpb3_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGIyYWFkYS1hZWY3LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-yrALocym0-Xh_Qyb8YdGbzPkQzFTFCXaNGRf2b5Ts=)
---
|
Friend,

Texas Democrats have been fighting for years to flip Texas blue, and I’m thrilled that we’re finally within striking distance. We have an incredible roster of candidates who have been laying the groundwork for the kind of change we need, and I know that if we power down ballot candidates across Texas, we can power Texas to victory and flip it blue.

Friend,

Our big win last week gave us a HUGE surge of momentum. But the countdown to the general election has already started, and we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas for a single second.

Chris Pappas is well-funded (thanks to Nancy Pelosi) and well-connected. He’s got Washington elites campaigning for him and they have already spent a ton of money - we’re talking MILLIONS of dollars - on TV ads ahead of Election Day.

_To keep up, we’ll need as much grassroots support as possible._

**That’s why we are launching a mid-month Money Bomb and it starts right now.**
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=4b40cbf7d6a04f099acc68a956d728ea&_e=SQGoRhpKW0BrT1IDlfCJKzBw8LQtxkYAHWaxxVaN50cFlWnW4i5C8vUjxnAUZaIateeVK0P-Rqtemz12f8zMbzVIvCPAaCsAeOofEtcoMKBPwEYwqQqeTzg-lH2RWPQx6_T_ggkdGA3Kd1ZF31_Hf2gXtJ2hqa4X55hGO8HZTo_Ss0TUbvTjErhdYaryg1dxnXrAaIz5F9SNih5kA0EreJPg-X5n-zObl_cvBZ47DKCiPph6nplmqbwjUCHXHKRbYyqF2KqVwTqnVQcJxcfi13Zeox7WGV_g35owNg3ECExMlsPIzR7_O4dFhAXeGbAu0O6rhDI-ol9AlnonLrN4omIgdFiTcOGymPZWTTSwn3gbfL7Uq7Pzfqo5RveIDj1YK53D6-ZF1i4ELDovt24os1jh9yi6iiF0BxndrRXOtZ95mVoxd2-AT9LZgLmMglAAQ6QxBvY8PVAd_FpfIG8i7Pw6cwqcCi4kTSlVXOx2x1rwhF5zlR5XssFeW6mI7SwC)
Joining is simple - just chip in $5 today and pledge to chip in another $5 at the end of the month.

By joining the Money Bomb, your support is going twice as far. That means Team Mowers can keep twice as many ads running, put up twice as many yard signs, knock on twice as many doors, and buy twice as many pizzas for the hungry volunteers who keep our campaign going.

name: Tom Cotton
subject: BLM rioters chanted "We hope they die"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
****

I hope you will join me in praying for the two Los Angeles police officers who were shot by a violent criminal. Over the weekend, these police officers were brutally attacked by a violent criminal who shot them at point-blank range.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NjQyOTcS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTMwMTIzMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

******I hope you will join me in praying for the two Los Angeles deputies who were shot by a violent criminal.**

Over the weekend, these deputies were brutally attacked. Then, liberal protesters blocked the hospital entrance and chanted _" we hope they die."_

[__](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NjQyOTcS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTMwMTIzMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

**Let those words sink in.

"We hope they die."**

In Lancaster, Pennsylvania, a police officer justifiably shot and killed a knife-wielding attacker. **Black Lives Matter then staged a riot in the town** , apparently angry that the police officer defended his own life and the life of others.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NjQyOTcS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTMwMTIzMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Can we call this what it is? How many more riots do we need to see?

This isn't a protest movement: _it 's a violent mob that hates the police._

While the Democrat party is the party of defunding the police and bailing out violent criminals from jail, I proudly **Back the Blue.**

[**Will you join me in standing up for our law enforcement against the Black Lives Matter mob?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NjQyOTcS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTMwMTIzMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter, President Trump and I promise to **Back the Blue** and stand up for law enforcement, even if Democrats and the media won't.

We can't let Joe Biden and the violent BLM mob win this election.

[**< <Help me stop the madness and stand up to the violent mob>>**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NjQyOTcS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTMwMTIzMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****

In Service,
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NjQyOTcS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTMwMTIzMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Tom Cotton

Georgia voters are geared up for a fight |

* In Georgia's June primary, Democrats outnumbered Republicans by more than **250,000 votes**

* **437,003 Democratic primary voters** participated in a primary election for their VERY FIRST time

* Georgia Democrats set a record this year for primary election turnout, CRUSHING the previous record by **nearly 223,000 votes**

* **More Black Georgians voted in the 2020 primary** than in the 2008 primary when Barack Obama was on the ballot

* Since 2018, when Stacey Abrams came within 55,000 votes of becoming Governor, more than **750,000 NEW VOTERS are registered** and eligible to vote here

There's no way around it: **Georgia is THE battleground state, and Georgia voters are geared up for a fight.**

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Rapid testing for our schools
body:
Yesterday was the first day of school. It was also the first day of our new, dedicated Pre-K-12 testing system.
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Yesterday we sent our kids back to school, and we launched our new, dedicated Pre-K-12 testing system. To stay ahead of the virus and keep students, teachers, and other school employees safe, we've geared up to provide an additional 5,000 tests every day specifically for our school community. If you work at a school and you need a test, or if your child needs a test, you can schedule a same-day test by calling our dedicated Pre-K-12 COVID Test Scheduling Service at (844) 857-1814. The service is available seven days a week, from 7:30 a.m. to 9:30 p.m. This scheduling line is reserved for students, teachers, and staff who have symptoms, or who have been in close contact of someone who is positive.
---
|
---
| Individuals who are symptomatic and call this scheduling service will get two tests during their appointment: a rapid test, which will have results the same day, and a more definitive PCR test that takes an average of 48 hours to provide results. If they are getting tested because they were a close contact of someone with COVID-19, they'll only get the PCR test. We have tests being administered at [14 sites throughout the state](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016DWhVAehAIubvpkk7mNZsCkaIE0B-PTDely1iwEhl8ZZmt_pPT4WiV4GqBuSw1NWjUtNLvBKrqujeutiTKtYJOlDhHx6DayYqlNbYUhMuaxlJagkvSqqUwwwuK2PJsdbEmHUTqxV0RVnKF2zwcfjYnbyQuleyCTtWrk5ZfPcdQ7QHln8rjyQAZKLCUSfG9_3&c=8dXCGx8V1woQ1VqKyPP1tZ1O9YfAfrrAsXqCT2zm9XaSCKbk670tWQ==&ch=y1TVC39ZWH3YSRyeHKYafZlTESLwt_HRY4sqSBBWe16P30-reFSe-w==) and can accommodate both drive-up appointments or walk-up appointments. Appointments can be scheduled by parents, guardians, teachers, staff members, and students older than 16 years old. Children younger than 16 will need a parent or guardian to schedule the test for them. Those who are tested should expect to be out of school or work for a period of time, even if the result is negative. We aren't taking any chances with potential cases.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016DWhVAehAIubvpkk7mNZsCkaIE0B-PTDely1iwEhl8ZZmt_pPT4WiZZrtKuCk_d7_5BeajOkMDrtmgprUo0SRsM-PA661_thQUbqvjSCCr7gzLHDMIcXzyUi_WXR9cLweQgVfNHS6Sil-qNFbxrmKQaNo7F2rOSyZ2aTqxUDV0E4BTNMlqbTeog3sPAbzrpgxOYPNWJ_FqM=&c=8dXCGx8V1woQ1VqKyPP1tZ1O9YfAfrrAsXqCT2zm9XaSCKbk670tWQ==&ch=y1TVC39ZWH3YSRyeHKYafZlTESLwt_HRY4sqSBBWe16P30-reFSe-w==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016DWhVAehAIubvpkk7mNZsCkaIE0B-PTDely1iwEhl8ZZmt_pPT4WiZZrtKuCk_d7_5BeajOkMDrtmgprUo0SRsM-PA661_thQUbqvjSCCr7gzLHDMIcXzyUi_WXR9cLweQgVfNHS6Sil-qNFbxrmKQaNo7F2rOSyZ2aTqxUDV0E4BTNMlqbTeog3sPAbzrpgxOYPNWJ_FqM=&c=8dXCGx8V1woQ1VqKyPP1tZ1O9YfAfrrAsXqCT2zm9XaSCKbk670tWQ==&ch=y1TVC39ZWH3YSRyeHKYafZlTESLwt_HRY4sqSBBWe16P30-reFSe-w==).
---
| These additional 5,000 tests are a crucial part of our strategy to get our students safely back in school. Today, I visited the East Providence Senior Center testing site to see how it was going, and I was so impressed by what I saw. We're prepared to perform tests quickly and safely, enabling us to contain the virus while limiting the disruption in learning.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016DWhVAehAIubvpkk7mNZsCkaIE0B-PTDely1iwEhl8ZZmt_pPT4WiV4GqBuSw1NW9oqMov735lhr5ve9fjSzwzYSlYOGjPgYqO0nEDm3E_3eqjpTFYTamo-eLAZ26E0ot-gJwKkl7AdMslpcsfbiHl9TndGKEjuqwkywG98B2dGlruRI20oMaqQwjBGmalSip06MSa0NX8wHJciRMiRg_exmWsaaibpDUvXgJ_i8uONCQ6ljwIeNRrwAWwph3CgCxZPrJ9sQSJhlsSytU750W3Ib3_OOn9QfA5nA4Gi2pkwQmWvDxEJjnrkLeonATqV4Dh4-VOwzjPk=&c=8dXCGx8V1woQ1VqKyPP1tZ1O9YfAfrrAsXqCT2zm9XaSCKbk670tWQ==&ch=y1TVC39ZWH3YSRyeHKYafZlTESLwt_HRY4sqSBBWe16P30-reFSe-w==).

clean_body: Yesterday was the first day of school. It was also the first day of our new, dedicated Pre-K-12 testing system. | | | | | | | Hello friend, Yesterday we sent our kids back to school, and we launched our new, dedicated Pre-K-12 testing system. To stay ahead of the virus and keep students, teachers, and other school employees safe, we've geared up to provide an additional 5,000 tests every day specifically for our school community. If you work at a school and you need a test, or if your child needs a test, you can schedule a same-day test by calling our dedicated Pre-K-12 COVID Test Scheduling Service at (844) 857-1814. The service is available seven days a week, from 7:30 a.m. to 9:30 p.m. This scheduling line is reserved for students, teachers, and staff who have symptoms, or who have been in close contact of someone who is positive. | | Individuals who are symptomatic and call this scheduling service will get two tests during their appointment: a rapid test, which will have results the same day, and a more definitive PCR test that takes an average of 48 hours to provide results. If they are getting tested because they were a close contact of someone with COVID-19, they'll only get the PCR test. We have tests being administered at == and can accommodate both drive-up appointments or walk-up appointments. Appointments can be scheduled by parents, guardians, teachers, staff members, and students older than 16 years old. Children younger than 16 will need a parent or guardian to schedule the test for them. Those who are tested should expect to be out of school or work for a period of time, even if the result is negative. We aren't taking any chances with potential cases. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | These additional 5,000 tests are a crucial part of our strategy to get our students safely back in school. Today, I visited the East Providence Senior Center testing site to see how it was going, and I was so impressed by what I saw. We're prepared to perform tests quickly and safely, enabling us to contain the virus while limiting the disruption in learning. We're all in this together, -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Texas Fraternal Order of Police Endorses Wesley Hunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Texas Fraternal Order of Police Endorses Wesley Hunt**

Houston, TX - Today, Wesley Hunt was honored to receive the endorsement of the Texas Fraternal Order of Police in his campaign to represent Texas' 7th District in Congress. Wesley's commitment to supporting the men and women of our law enforcement is steadfast, and as the next representative for the 7th District, Wesley will work to strengthen the relationship between our communities and our law enforcement officers and ensure the officers of our police departments have the resources they need to effectively do their jobs.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=8fc90dc1f2ef40e284e496d34ba10dbc&_e=yFIa-p8sLJFsujMxR2P43u_d0INpEEVEH36HzvCmEXNFYSZedHcO2STvRLX7IVQQ8ZCDQFtFnFvpx7jlkBaBvuc6YEy6ObGByDfdHroF9zbrc-YPSIgvtwGsf2KIvL94LKJbIJOVBtqQx-fsKsEq31RBRoHqFNZ2Iyfqefhf9dzN4Ow-SwdFuGJuKQg_GLzo_tto18fIpmVJQ6EVWtVp-uL22nM7cItDeVKrpwGWL0bp7zWEhBTqMvJ1hmwkcp2DaxcpstSDB-s_lKZKCEkIEYOcvb_jcwD6vhw0qRl5bkevOd47RQbcX8F2ktJr1Gkkp5Y0trLuBKU0u0ZSgXyRnAyPYWS_NqPSWzGBx4G1ZRI%3D)
_[Click Here To Watch The Full Endorsement](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=8fc90dc1f2ef40e284e496d34ba10dbc&_e=yFIa-p8sLJFsujMxR2P43u_d0INpEEVEH36HzvCmEXNFYSZedHcO2STvRLX7IVQQ8ZCDQFtFnFvpx7jlkBaBvuc6YEy6ObGByDfdHroF9zbrc-YPSIgvtwGsf2KIvL943zkqgGN_5lzNxO_8dD6bWcpNarwE_aCXSJpXtQSPv5OF758X1AnmT999NpPc7_CyqN81lNiZ4QxKXpkxf8XgI4lQE7T9Se5ElHF14yjeMpnfkKFrMQ8LiQE_cwghoSY4UVEDlM2YTpP5Ht9jreIYO5yiCpM5r9WHFl1UJ-rYzITiA2C1k-wwFg1UeKX46d-p4akR3Ov7tdsf_6bZpEyBmRdKTlMBl9kr4V1EBc1U7oA%3D)_
_"I'm honored today to represent the Texas Fraternal Order of Police, representing 15,000 police officers across the state, as we announce our endorsement for Wesley Hunt in his run for Texas' 7th Congressional District. __Wesley Hunt walks the walk. Whether that's showing up during the height of the COVID-19 pandemic and providing much-needed PPE supplies for our officers, or meeting with our officers and actually getting to know who they are as people," _**said National Fraternal Order of Police Vice President Joe Gamaldi**. _"__It's picking up the phone when one of our officers is injured and checking on that officer and their family. This is but a small taste of who Wesley is and what he stands for. And we know, if given the opportunity, he will bring that same caring spirit to everyone in this district and everyone across the country."_

_"I would like to extend my deepest thanks to the members of the Texas Fraternal Order of Police for having me here today and for endorsing my campaign for Congress; I am humbled to have earned your trust and support. In Congress, I hope to magnify the ethos of selfless service you bring to our neighborhoods and communities. Unfortunately, my opponent has become another enabler of the chaos and division running rampant in our country. And she has let us down, not just through her actions, but also through her inaction," **Hunt continued. **"I pledge to you today that I will always fight for Houston and our values. Just as you hold the line and keep chaos at bay in our city, I will hold the line against the senseless partisanship in Congress."_

Hunt is a Houston native and battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District.
###

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=8fc90dc1f2ef40e284e496d34ba10dbc&_e=yFIa-p8sLJFsujMxR2P43rcRTqZpE8atkd7jKAONCtgQ1HBgB_Lfm6GIAu7huVz1RjACVHW_G0vUaTItVC591IV-3McGF9ZF86-N86lgARoOhm6w4vKu4SkA8AvzDsV5Uv3w5AAranlG6DHaFdZu47nBGPNrIx_qgItqVEevs_6_BIu3EG_tXtZge8lft8pIRfYwsqSqW3zsBuwL0OYIK-0HmO_pxFgoUMPwIkWscdrWp_ODXkE0Air2ZHu3mVvlYvA-OA7lRfeN2AKrNQIBWwuMpXBxXDnBoIJaKVbPixk%3D)****

While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District. **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

Peter, hours ahead of the mid-month deadline before our LAST FEC Fundraising Deadline quarter, Limousine Liberal Mike Bloomberg announced his intentions to spend whatever it takes to defeat Trump.**

Us Republicans aren't relying on radical billionaires to defend our values and agenda. We have real Americans who want to live freely, keep their hard-earned dollars in their own pockets, protect their communities, and put America FIRST.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: "It'll start getting cooler. You just watch." - Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8154%2E868730%2EvVexKr) Friend, Yesterday, Donald Trump visited the fire-ravaged West Coast to see the damage first hand. I hoped it would be an enlightening trip because seeing the devastation here is sobering. It's a front row seat to the climate crisis, to the grief of families losing everything, even each other. There is no denying what's in front of us. **Instead, Donald Trump said this: "It'll start getting cooler. You just watch. I don't think science knows, actually."** You don't need me to tell you he's wrong. The science on this couldn't be more clear: The climate crisis is man-made, and decisions made and policies enforced by Donald Trump are only accelerating the devastating effects. And wildfires start faster and expand quicker because of the climate crisis. I, like my fellow governors along the West Coast, am ready to work with federal officials to protect Americans from wildfires caused by the climate crisis. But President Trump's visit only served to prove we're in this alone. When there's a dereliction of leadership -- and duty -- in the White House, it becomes even clearer why state leadership matters so much. It's why I'm fighting with my heart and soul to end the climate crisis. While Trump denies and distracts, Washingtonians know I'm in their corner to fight for them, their lives, and their homes. President Trump denied the science and delayed action as the threat of COVID-19 spread, and we're all seeing the consequences. He's spent his life denying science and delaying action that could end the climate crisis, and we're breathing in those consequences across the West Coast. **It's why I am asking you to invest in this campaign. I am the only West Coast governor up for reelection this year. Donald Trump and my GOP opponent, Loren Culp -- who has denied that climate change plays a role in these wildfires -- want us to ignore what's literally burning in front of us, but we can't afford to.** **A donation right now is an investment in leadership that trusts science, puts people over politics, and steps up to fight the climate crisis tooth and nail when GOP leaders back down.[Invest in that work with a donation of $5 or more to ensure science wins over denialism.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11244?t=4&akid=8154%2E868730%2EvVexKr)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11245?t=5&akid=8154%2E868730%2EvVexKr)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11246?t=6&akid=8154%2E868730%2EvVexKr)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11247?t=7&akid=8154%2E868730%2EvVexKr)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11248?t=8&akid=8154%2E868730%2EvVexKr)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11249?t=9&akid=8154%2E868730%2EvVexKr)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11244?t=10&akid=8154%2E868730%2EvVexKr)
---
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11244?t=11&akid=8154%2E868730%2EvVexKr)

We're less than 50 days away from Election Day on November 3rd, and we're coming up against a critically important fundraising deadline.

**[Can you chip in today to help us reach our $10,000 goal before midnight tonight?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dad2/53d9897e/55edc629/1c880c11/2801032310/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-10k?refcode=20200915_f_2_nd__785__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

> Derek:

> September marks the end of the last quarter before the election. It's a huge fundraising milestone and the homestretch of this campaign. It's critical that we demonstrate support for Mark Warner across the Commonwealth. **[Can you help us show strong support for Mark by pitching in today?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dad2/53d9897e/55edc629/1c880c1e/2801032310/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-10k?refcode=20200915_f_2_nd__785__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5")**
>
> Of course, we'd love to think that Virginia was a "safe" blue state -- but our team remembers Mark's election in 2014, when he won by less than 1%. The polling in that race indicated that his seat was safe, but the election was decided by just 17,000 votes.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Seven weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Election Day is exactly seven weeks from today. People are already mailing in their ballots right now. So it's time to pour everything we can into this fight. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525193/45c30650/1c07ac5fe/66e8f7d2/1491845278/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Election Day is exactly seven weeks from today.

People are already mailing in their ballots right now.

So it's time to pour everything we can into this fight.

**Today, I'm endorsing ten more Warren Democrats who are ready to fight for bold reforms and put people first:**

**U.S. Senate**

Adrian Perkins (Louisiana)

Abby Broyles (Oklahoma)

Marquita Bradshaw (Tennessee)

**U.S. House of Representatives**

Hiral Tipirneni (Arizona 6th)

Nikema Williams (Georgia 5th)

Donna Imam (Texas 31st)

Amy Kennedy (New Jersey 2nd)

**State Legislature**

T'wina Nobles (Washington State Senate)

* Vanna Howard (Massachusetts State House)

Adam Gomez (Massachusetts State Senate)

**They're counting on grassroots donors to power their campaigns -- so let's fight by their side.**

**[If you'd be able to make a donation, will you chip in $2 or whatever makes sense to help elect Democrats like these up and down the ballot?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525193/45c30650/1c07ac5fe/66e8f7d4/1491845278/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjEyRl9BTk5fRU5EX0VfMjAyMDA5MTVfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV12F_ANN_END_E_20200915_V1S1_P")**

Together, we can win the White House, take back the Senate, expand our House majority, and flip state houses across the country -- by electing Democrats who know that we need big, structural change.

We can show the powerful special interests that they won't always get to run the show in Washington.

We can make our country work for everyone, not just for a thin slice at the top.

But it's only possible if we fight shoulder to shoulder and get organized at the grassroots level. Then, seven weeks from tomorrow, we'll be able to look back and know that we did everything we could to turn the page on this dark chapter in our nation's history.

**[So if you're in a place where it makes sense for you, please make a contribution today and help elect leaders who will put power in the hands of working people.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525193/45c30650/1c07ac5fe/66e8f7d4/1491845278/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjEyRl9BTk5fRU5EX0VfMjAyMDA5MTVfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV12F_ANN_END_E_20200915_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525193/45c30650/1c07ac5fe/66e8f7d4/1491845278/VEsEDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjEyRl9BTk5fRU5EX0VfMjAyMDA5MTVfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV12F_ANN_END_E_20200915_V1S1_P")

name: Elias (Digital Director)
subject: why we're sending you so many emails
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
I wouldn't if it wasn't important, friend |
---
Friend,

Remember what happened with Georgia's primary in June:

_Thousands of voters standing in line, often for hours, many in the pouring rain, to exercise their Constitutional right._

**It was pure political corruption, friend -- a voting system that failed by design in places with high concentrations of Black and working-class voters.**

**[So before I get on with my email: Friend, can you chip in ANY AMOUNT during this critical moment in Georgia to ensure a fair election for Jon Ossoff?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2879/5b2c1286/39b92727/25f30d16/1777159615/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_15_elias_mm?refcode=em_2020_09_15_elias_mm")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [EXPRESS DONATE: $10](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2879/5b2c1286/39b92727/25f30d19/1777159615/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_15_elias_mm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_09_15_elias_mm_ex_10")
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE: $20](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2879/5b2c1286/39b92727/25f30d18/1777159615/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_15_elias_mm?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_2020_09_15_elias_mm_ex_20")
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE: $50](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2879/5b2c1286/39b92727/25f30d1b/1777159615/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_15_elias_mm?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_09_15_elias_mm_ex_50")
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE: $100](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2879/5b2c1286/39b92727/25f30d1a/1777159615/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_15_elias_mm?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_09_15_elias_mm_ex_100")
---
| [Or donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2879/5b2c1286/39b92727/25f30d1d/1777159615/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_15_elias_mm?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_09_15_elias_mm_ex_other")
---

The GOP is scared, and they're doing everything they can to stop us.

**Since June, Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP have (not so discreetly) attempted to undermine our electoral system while spending __MILLIONS__ to stop Jon Ossoff.**

**_Despite it all, Jon is still narrowly ahead of his opponent, Senator David Perdue, in the polls._**

But here's the deal: To fight back against the GOP's crooked antics and ensure a fair election for Jon, we need to double our investment in critical digital organizing and voter projection **_immediately_**.

**[Friend -- can you pitch in $20 before our critical mid-month deadline _(in just a few hours!!!)_ to guarantee a fair election for Jon in Georgia?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2879/5b2c1286/39b92727/25f30d1c/1777159615/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_15_elias_mm?refcode=em_2020_09_15_elias_mm&amount=20")**

| [DONATE $20](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2879/5b2c1286/39b92727/25f30d1c/1777159615/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_15_elias_mm?refcode=em_2020_09_15_elias_mm&amount=20")
---

You keep this movement going -- _it's why I'm always emailing you, friend_ \-- and we're counting on your support!

Let's get it done together.

Elias Duncan
Digital Director
Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate

name: Team MJ
subject: Hispanic Heritage Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4c/7f51f7bc/45740536/4efa1bb9/2637175910/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

This year as we celebrate Hispanic Heritage month and the contributions of Hispanic and Latino families to the fabric of our society, we do so in the shadow of a crisis that is disproportionately affecting Latino communities. But with the strength of family and faith and a little help from allies, we can ensure that we make it through these trying times just as Hispanic families have for generations.

When MJ tells stories about her time serving in uniform, it's often about the people she served with and learned so much from. Folks from different backgrounds -- be it ethnicity, religion, economic status, or national origin -- came together to complete the mission. On the battlefield, they had each other's backs. Unity, teamwork, and the shared mission was the only way to succeed and this is how we will make it through the challenge before us.

From the farm worker to the grocery store clerk to the emergency room doctor and teacher in the classroom, we are seeing the contributions of Latinos on the frontlines of this crisis just as we would on a battlefield. Right now, we need to come together to recover -- not build barriers amongst ourselves.

Meanwhile Sen. Cornyn turned a blind eye -- failing to take the action we desperately needed to contain COVID-19, which is now disproportionately affecting Latino communities in Texas. Then, when it came to light that many minority-owned small businesses were denied PPP loans, he refused to even vote on a bill that would address this disparity.

MJ took an oath to defend against threats both foreign and domestic -- that's why she believes we have to mobilize _all_ of our resources to support communities ravaged by COVID-19. It's why she's called on leaders to step up their support and listen to our cries for help.

Let's make this Hispanic Heritage Month not just a celebration of the contributions of Latinos across the state of Texas, and our country, but also a recognition that we _need_ to confront the challenges that Latinos face every day. For the next 49 days, let's continue working to elect leaders who recognize that there is so much more we have to do. \-- Team MJ P.S. We're continuing the conversation at a special event tomorrow evening where MJ will be joined by Congressman Joaquin Castro, Congressman Vicente Gonzalez, and other special guests to discuss the importance and power of Latino voters. [**Sign up here and we 'll send you all the details you need to join.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4c/7f51f7bc/45740536/4efa1bb8/2637175910/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://www.mobilize.us/mjfortexas/event/322312/")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4c/7f51f7bc/45740536/4efa1bbf/2637175910/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2125&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4c/7f51f7bc/45740536/4efa1bbe/2637175910/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW: Major peace deals signed at the White House!
body:
History was made today at the White House as leaders from Israel, the United Arab Emirates, and Bahrain met with President Trump... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=833d9ae866&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 15, 2020
---
| | |
# **NEW: Major peace deals signed at the White House!**

**History was made today** at the White House as leaders from Israel, the United Arab Emirates, and Bahrain met with President Trump and signed the Abraham Accords, which will normalize diplomatic relations between Israel and the two Arab nations.

**Before this summer,** only two peace deals involving Israel had been negotiated in the last 72 years, with the most recent coming in 1994. During the past month alone, President Trump has helped broker two such agreements.

**🎬** [President Trump: A foundation for peace nobody thought possible!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=206d9e03b9&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Today the world sees** that [these nations] are choosing cooperation over conflict, friendship over enmity, prosperity over poverty, and hope over despair,” President Trump said.

“**They are choosing** a future in which Arabs and Israelis, Muslims, Jews, and Christians can live together, pray together, and dream together.”

**The first steps** between Israel and both Bahrain and the UAE are an exchange of embassies and ambassadors, as well as the start of direct commercial flights between countries.

**Each leader spoke** today about the significance of the Abraham Accords in the pursuit of enduring peace in the Middle East:
* **“This day is a pivot** of history. It heralds a new dawn of peace,” Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu of Israel said.

* **“Peace requires courage,** and shaping the future requires knowledge,” Abdullah bin Zayed Al Nahyan of the United Arab Emirates said. “We have come today to tell the world that this is our approach.”

* **“Today is a truly historic** occasion—a moment of hope and opportunity for all the peoples of the Middle East,” Abdullatif bin Rashid Al-Zayani of Bahrain said.

**When President Trump took office,** the Middle East was fraught with turmoil. Today, a geopolitical transformation is underway. As more and more Arab countries begin to establish direct ties with Israel, the region’s prospects for peace, economic growth, technological innovation, and opportunities for young people will only improve.

**“The people of the Middle East** will no longer allow hatred of Israel to be fomented as an excuse for radicalism or extremism,” President Trump said.

**🎬** [The Middle East is breaking free from failed approaches of the past](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3990f2ff62&e=3ee4985eea)

**The failed foreign policy** approaches of the past only served to stoke division, empower bad actors, and permit violence to spread across the Middle East. The signing of the Abraham Accords today begins a new, brighter chapter that rewards true peace.

**Earlier this month** , President Trump also announced a historic economic agreement between Serbia and Kosovo. That deal led to a pledge from Serbia to move its embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem, while Kosovo has agreed to mutual recognition with Israel.

**In other words,** President Trump’s bold, creative diplomacy gets real-world results. The ISIS caliphate is destroyed, trust is being restored with America’s allies, extremists are being sidelined, and American troops are coming home from never-ending wars.

**“After decades** of division and conflict, we mark the dawn of a new Middle East,” President Trump said.

**🎬**[The Abraham Accords are signed in English, Hebrew, and Arabic!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=34fdfd5ea0&e=3ee4985eea)

📖 [President Trump is leading a transformation in the Middle East](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=838446a373&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump, Foreign Affairs Minister of Bahrain Abdullatif bin Rashid Al-Zayani, Prime Minister**** ****of Israel**** Benjamin Netanyahu, and Foreign Affairs Minister ****o****f**** ****the United Arab Emirates Abdullah bin Zayed Al Nahyan wave after signing the Abraham Accords** | September 15, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=62c8d634af&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7c805aef52&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a412c5c25a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Subject: Big money in politics -- Spoiler! We don’t have it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8d11081e1d1f/subject-big-money-in-politics-spoiler-we-dont-have-it?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
When I began this race and people asked what my key issues were, I said jobs, healthcare, education, and the climate crisis. And over the course of the past twelve months of campaigning, those things have remained priorities, but I’ve also added a critical issue: **campaign finance reform.** The reason is simple: Big money in politics has so significantly corrupted the integrity of our democracy, it’s barely recognizable as such. We have representatives like Adam Kinzinger, who takes nearly 95% of his campaign donations from wealthy conservative donors and corporate PACs. It’s no wonder people like Kinzinger prioritize the interests of corporations: They know who they answer to, and it’s not their constituents. I vowed not to take a cent of dirty money at the beginning of this campaign, and I have kept my promise. The truth is, Kinzinger can keep his villainous donors, because I’ve got you. Our average campaign donation is just about $65. [Can you make a $65 donation today and help us compete with Kinzinger’s dirty money?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=df571b94af&e=140a9b81e7) 49 more days -- we are going to cross the line, with your help! Dani
